# rocSOLVER LAPACK functions[#](#rocsolver-lapack-functions)

LAPACK routines solve complex numerical linear algebra problems. These functions are organized into the following categories:

[Triangular factorizations](#triangular): Based on Gaussian elimination.[Orthogonal factorizations](#orthogonal): Based on Householder reflections.[Problem and matrix reductions](#reductions): Transformation of matrices and problems into equivalent forms.[Linear-systems solvers](#linears): Based on triangular factorizations.[Least-squares solvers](#leastsqr): Based on orthogonal factorizations.[Symmetric eigensolvers](#eigens): Eigenproblems for symmetric matrices.[Singular value decomposition](#svds): Singular values and related problems for general matrices.

Note

The API descriptions use the following notations:

`i`

,`j`

, and`k`

are used as general purpose indices. In some legacy LAPACK APIs,`k`

can be a parameter indicating some problem or matrix dimension.Depending on the context, when it is necessary to index rows, columns, and blocks or submatrices,

`i`

is assigned to rows,`j`

to columns, and`k`

to blocks.`l`

is always used to index matrices or problems in a batch.`x[i]`

stands for the i-th element of vector x, while`A[i,j]`

represents the element in the i-th row and j-th column of matrix`A`

. Indices are 1-based, for instance,`x[1]`

is the first element of`x`

.To identify a block in a matrix or a matrix in the batch,

`k`

and`l`

are used as sub-indices`x_i`

\(=x_i\). Both notations are used, \(x_i\) when displaying mathematical equations and`x_i`

in the text describing the function parameters.If

`X`

is a real vector or matrix, \(X^T\) indicates its transpose. If`X`

is complex, then \(X^H\) represents its conjugate transpose. When`X`

could be real or complex, the descriptions use`X'`

to indicate`X`

transposed or`X`

conjugate transposed, accordingly.When a matrix

`A`

is formed as the product of several matrices, the following notation is used:`A=M(1)M(2)...M(t)`

.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dpotf2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dpotf214rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_spotf2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_spotf214rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int) POTF2 computes the Cholesky factorization of a real symmetric (complex Hermitian) positive definite matrix A.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form:

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A = U'U & \: \text{if uplo is upper, or}\\ A = LL' & \: \text{if uplo is lower.} \end{array} \end{split}\]U is an upper triangular matrix and L is lower triangular.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrix A to be factored. On exit, the lower or upper triangular factor.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**info**–**[out]**pointer to a rocblas_int on the GPU. If info = 0, successful factorization of matrix A. If info = i > 0, the leading minor of order i of A is not positive definite. The factorization stopped at this point.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dpotf2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dpotf2_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_spotf2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_spotf2_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) POTF2_BATCHED computes the Cholesky factorization of a batch of real symmetric (complex Hermitian) positive definite matrices.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form:

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l^{} = U_l'U_l^{} & \: \text{if uplo is upper, or}\\ A_l^{} = L_l^{}L_l' & \: \text{if uplo is lower.} \end{array} \end{split}\]\(U_l\) is an upper triangular matrix and \(L_l\) is lower triangular.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of matrix A_l.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the upper or lower triangular factors.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful factorization of matrix A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, the leading minor of order i of A_l is not positive definite. The l-th factorization stopped at this point.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zpotf2_strided_batched_64([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const int64_t n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const int64_t lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, int64_t *info, const int64_t batch_count)[#](#_CPPv435rocsolver_zpotf2_strided_batched_6414rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK7int64_tP22rocblas_double_complexK7int64_tK14rocblas_strideP7int64_tK7int64_t)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zpotf2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_zpotf2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dpotf2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_dpotf2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_spotf2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_spotf2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) POTF2_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the Cholesky factorization of a batch of real symmetric (complex Hermitian) positive definite matrices.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form:

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l^{} = U_l'U_l^{} & \: \text{if uplo is upper, or}\\ A_l^{} = L_l^{}L_l' & \: \text{if uplo is lower.} \end{array} \end{split}\]\(U_l\) is an upper triangular matrix and \(L_l\) is lower triangular.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of matrix A_l.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the upper or lower triangular factors.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful factorization of matrix A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, the leading minor of order i of A_l is not positive definite. The l-th factorization stopped at this point.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dpotrf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dpotrf14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_spotrf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_spotrf14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int) POTRF computes the Cholesky factorization of a real symmetric (complex Hermitian) positive definite matrix A.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form:

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A = U'U & \: \text{if uplo is upper, or}\\ A = LL' & \: \text{if uplo is lower.} \end{array} \end{split}\]U is an upper triangular matrix and L is lower triangular.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrix A to be factored. On exit, the lower or upper triangular factor.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**info**–**[out]**pointer to a rocblas_int on the GPU. If info = 0, successful factorization of matrix A. If info = i > 0, the leading minor of order i of A is not positive definite. The factorization stopped at this point.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zpotrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zpotrf_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cpotrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_cpotrf_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dpotrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dpotrf_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_spotrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_spotrf_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) POTRF_BATCHED computes the Cholesky factorization of a batch of real symmetric (complex Hermitian) positive definite matrices.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form:

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l^{} = U_l'U_l^{} & \: \text{if uplo is upper, or}\\ A_l^{} = L_l^{}L_l' & \: \text{if uplo is lower.} \end{array} \end{split}\]\(U_l\) is an upper triangular matrix and \(L_l\) is lower triangular.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of matrix A_l.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the upper or lower triangular factors.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful factorization of matrix A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, the leading minor of order i of A_l is not positive definite. The l-th factorization stopped at this point.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_spotrf_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_spotrf_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) POTRF_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the Cholesky factorization of a batch of real symmetric (complex Hermitian) positive definite matrices.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form:

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l^{} = U_l'U_l^{} & \: \text{if uplo is upper, or}\\ A_l^{} = L_l^{}L_l' & \: \text{if uplo is lower.} \end{array} \end{split}\]\(U_l\) is an upper triangular matrix and \(L_l\) is lower triangular.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of matrix A_l.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the upper or lower triangular factors.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful factorization of matrix A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, the leading minor of order i of A_l is not positive definite. The l-th factorization stopped at this point.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgetf2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zgetf214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgetf2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_cgetf214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgetf2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgetf214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetf2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgetf214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int) GETF2 computes the LU factorization of a general m-by-n matrix A using partial pivoting with row interchanges.

(This is the unblocked Level-2-BLAS version of the algorithm. An optimized internal implementation without rocBLAS calls could be executed with small and mid-size matrices if optimizations are enabled (default option). For more details, see the “Tuning rocSOLVER performance” section of the Library Design Guide).

The factorization has the form

\[ A = PLU \]where P is a permutation matrix, L is lower triangular with unit diagonal elements (lower trapezoidal if m > n), and U is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m < n).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of the matrix A.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrix A to be factored. On exit, the factors L and U from the factorization. The unit diagonal elements of L are not stored.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The vector of pivot indices. Elements of ipiv are 1-based indices. For 1 <= i <= min(m,n), the row i of the matrix was interchanged with row ipiv[i]. Matrix P of the factorization can be derived from ipiv.**info**–**[out]**pointer to a rocblas_int on the GPU. If info = 0, successful exit. If info = i > 0, U is singular. U[i,i] is the first zero pivot.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgetf2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dgetf2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetf2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgetf2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) GETF2_BATCHED computes the LU factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices using partial pivoting with row interchanges.

(This is the unblocked Level-2-BLAS version of the algorithm. An optimized internal implementation without rocBLAS calls could be executed with small and mid-size matrices if optimizations are enabled (default option). For more details, see the “Tuning rocSOLVER performance” section of the Library Design Guide).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[ A_l = P_lL_lU_l \]where \(P_l\) is a permutation matrix, \(L_l\) is lower triangular with unit diagonal elements (lower trapezoidal if m > n), and \(U_l\) is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m < n).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the factors L_l and U_l from the factorizations. The unit diagonal elements of L_l are not stored.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors of pivot indices ipiv_l (corresponding to A_l). Dimension of ipiv_l is min(m,n). Elements of ipiv_l are 1-based indices. For each instance A_l in the batch and for 1 <= i <= min(m,n), the row i of the matrix A_l was interchanged with row ipiv_l[i]. Matrix P_l of the factorization can be derived from ipiv_l.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= min(m,n).**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for factorization of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, U_l is singular. U_l[i,i] is the first zero pivot.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgetf2_strided_batched_64([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const int64_t m, const int64_t n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const int64_t lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, int64_t *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, int64_t *info, const int64_t batch_count)[#](#_CPPv435rocsolver_zgetf2_strided_batched_6414rocblas_handleK7int64_tK7int64_tP22rocblas_double_complexK7int64_tK14rocblas_strideP7int64_tK14rocblas_strideP7int64_tK7int64_t)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgetf2_strided_batched_64([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const int64_t m, const int64_t n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const int64_t lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, int64_t *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, int64_t *info, const int64_t batch_count)[#](#_CPPv435rocsolver_cgetf2_strided_batched_6414rocblas_handleK7int64_tK7int64_tP21rocblas_float_complexK7int64_tK14rocblas_strideP7int64_tK14rocblas_strideP7int64_tK7int64_t)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgetf2_strided_batched_64([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const int64_t m, const int64_t n, double *A, const int64_t lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, int64_t *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, int64_t *info, const int64_t batch_count)[#](#_CPPv435rocsolver_dgetf2_strided_batched_6414rocblas_handleK7int64_tK7int64_tPdK7int64_tK14rocblas_strideP7int64_tK14rocblas_strideP7int64_tK7int64_t)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetf2_strided_batched_64([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const int64_t m, const int64_t n, float *A, const int64_t lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, int64_t *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, int64_t *info, const int64_t batch_count)[#](#_CPPv435rocsolver_sgetf2_strided_batched_6414rocblas_handleK7int64_tK7int64_tPfK7int64_tK14rocblas_strideP7int64_tK14rocblas_strideP7int64_tK7int64_t)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgetf2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_dgetf2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetf2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgetf2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) GETF2_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the LU factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices using partial pivoting with row interchanges.

(This is the unblocked Level-2-BLAS version of the algorithm. An optimized internal implementation without rocBLAS calls could be executed with small and mid-size matrices if optimizations are enabled (default option). For more details, see the “Tuning rocSOLVER performance” section of the Library Design Guide).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[ A_l = P_lL_lU_l \]where \(P_l\) is a permutation matrix, \(L_l\) is lower triangular with unit diagonal elements (lower trapezoidal if m > n), and \(U_l\) is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m < n).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the factors L_l and U_l from the factorization. The unit diagonal elements of L_l are not stored.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors of pivots indices ipiv_l (corresponding to A_l). Dimension of ipiv_l is min(m,n). Elements of ipiv_l are 1-based indices. For each instance A_l in the batch and for 1 <= i <= min(m,n), the row i of the matrix A_l was interchanged with row ipiv_l[i]. Matrix P_l of the factorization can be derived from ipiv_l.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= min(m,n).**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for factorization of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, U_l is singular. U_l[i,i] is the first zero pivot.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgetrf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgetrf14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetrf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgetrf14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int) GETRF computes the LU factorization of a general m-by-n matrix A using partial pivoting with row interchanges.

(This is the blocked Level-3-BLAS version of the algorithm. An optimized internal implementation without rocBLAS calls could be executed with mid-size matrices if optimizations are enabled (default option). For more details, see the “Tuning rocSOLVER performance” section of the Library Design Guide).

The factorization has the form

\[ A = PLU \]where P is a permutation matrix, L is lower triangular with unit diagonal elements (lower trapezoidal if m > n), and U is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m < n).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of the matrix A.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrix A to be factored. On exit, the factors L and U from the factorization. The unit diagonal elements of L are not stored.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The vector of pivot indices. Elements of ipiv are 1-based indices. For 1 <= i <= min(m,n), the row i of the matrix was interchanged with row ipiv[i]. Matrix P of the factorization can be derived from ipiv.**info**–**[out]**pointer to a rocblas_int on the GPU. If info = 0, successful exit. If info = i > 0, U is singular. U[i,i] is the first zero pivot.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetrf_batched_64([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const int64_t m, const int64_t n, float *const A[], const int64_t lda, int64_t *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, int64_t *info, const int64_t batch_count)[#](#_CPPv427rocsolver_sgetrf_batched_6414rocblas_handleK7int64_tK7int64_tA_PCfK7int64_tP7int64_tK14rocblas_strideP7int64_tK7int64_t)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgetrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dgetrf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgetrf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) GETRF_BATCHED computes the LU factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices using partial pivoting with row interchanges.

(This is the blocked Level-3-BLAS version of the algorithm. An optimized internal implementation without rocBLAS calls could be executed with mid-size matrices if optimizations are enabled (default option). For more details, see the “Tuning rocSOLVER performance” section of the Library Design Guide).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[ A_l = P_lL_lU_l \]where \(P_l\) is a permutation matrix, \(L_l\) is lower triangular with unit diagonal elements (lower trapezoidal if m > n), and \(U_l\) is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m < n).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the factors L_l and U_l from the factorizations. The unit diagonal elements of L_l are not stored.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors of pivot indices ipiv_l (corresponding to A_l). Dimension of ipiv_l is min(m,n). Elements of ipiv_l are 1-based indices. For each instance A_l in the batch and for 1 <= i <= min(m,n), the row i of the matrix A_l was interchanged with row ipiv_l[i]. Matrix P_l of the factorization can be derived from ipiv_l.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= min(m,n).**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for factorization of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, U_l is singular. U_l[i,i] is the first zero pivot.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetrf_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgetrf_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) GETRF_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the LU factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices using partial pivoting with row interchanges.

(This is the blocked Level-3-BLAS version of the algorithm. An optimized internal implementation without rocBLAS calls could be executed with mid-size matrices if optimizations are enabled (default option). For more details, see the “Tuning rocSOLVER performance” section of the Library Design Guide).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[ A_l = P_lL_lU_l \]where \(P_l\) is a permutation matrix, \(L_l\) is lower triangular with unit diagonal elements (lower trapezoidal if m > n), and \(U_l\) is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m < n).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the factors L_l and U_l from the factorization. The unit diagonal elements of L_l are not stored.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors of pivots indices ipiv_l (corresponding to A_l). Dimension of ipiv_l is min(m,n). Elements of ipiv_l are 1-based indices. For each instance A_l in the batch and for 1 <= i <= min(m,n), the row i of the matrix A_l was interchanged with row ipiv_l[i]. Matrix P_l of the factorization can be derived from ipiv_l.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= min(m,n).**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for factorization of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, U_l is singular. U_l[i,i] is the first zero pivot.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zsytf2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zsytf214rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsytf2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dsytf214rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssytf2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_ssytf214rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int) SYTF2 computes the factorization of a symmetric indefinite matrix \(A\) using Bunch-Kaufman diagonal pivoting.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A = U D U^T & \: \text{or}\\ A = L D L^T & \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(U\) or \(L\) is a product of permutation and unit upper/lower triangular matrices (depending on the value of uplo), and \(D\) is a symmetric block diagonal matrix with 1-by-1 and 2-by-2 diagonal blocks \(D_k\).

Specifically, \(U\) and \(L\) are computed as

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U = P(n) U(n) \cdots P(k) U(k) \cdots & \: \text{and}\\ L = P(1) L(1) \cdots P(k) L(k) \cdots & \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(k\) decreases from \(n\) to 1 (increases from 1 to \(n\)) in steps of 1 or 2, depending on the order of block \(D_k\), and \(P(k)\) is a permutation matrix defined by \(ipiv[k]\). If we let \(s\) denote the order of block \(D_k\), then \(U(k)\) and \(L(k)\) are unit upper/lower triangular matrices defined as

\[\begin{split} U(k) = \left[ \begin{array}{ccc} I_{k-s} & v & 0 \\ 0 & I_s & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & I_{n-k} \end{array} \right] \end{split}\]and

\[\begin{split} L(k) = \left[ \begin{array}{ccc} I_{k-1} & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & I_s & 0 \\ 0 & v & I_{n-k-s+1} \end{array} \right]. \end{split}\]If \(s = 1\), then \(D_k\) is stored in \(A[k,k]\) and \(v\) is stored in the upper/lower part of column \(k\) of \(A\). If \(s = 2\) and uplo is upper, then \(D_k\) is stored in \(A[k-1,k-1]\), \(A[k-1,k]\), and \(A[k,k]\), and \(v\) is stored in the upper parts of columns \(k-1\) and \(k\) of \(A\). If \(s = 2\) and uplo is lower, then \(D_k\) is stored in \(A[k,k]\), \(A[k+1,k]\), and \(A[k+1,k+1]\), and \(v\) is stored in the lower parts of columns \(k\) and \(k+1\) of \(A\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrix A is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the symmetric matrix A to be factored. On exit, the block diagonal matrix D and the multipliers needed to compute U or L.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU of dimension n. The vector of pivot indices. Elements of ipiv are 1-based indices. For 1 <= k <= n, if ipiv[k] > 0 then rows and columns k and ipiv[k] were interchanged and D[k,k] is a 1-by-1 diagonal block. If, instead, ipiv[k] = ipiv[k-1] < 0 and uplo is upper (or ipiv[k] = ipiv[k+1] < 0 and uplo is lower), then rows and columns k-1 and -ipiv[k] (or rows and columns k+1 and -ipiv[k]) were interchanged and D[k-1,k-1] to D[k,k] (or D[k,k] to D[k+1,k+1]) is a 2-by-2 diagonal block.**info**–**[out]**pointer to a rocblas_int on the GPU. If info = 0, successful exit. If info = i > 0, D is singular. D[i,i] is the first diagonal zero.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zsytf2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zsytf2_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_csytf2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_csytf2_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsytf2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dsytf2_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssytf2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_ssytf2_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) SYTF2_BATCHED computes the factorization of a batch of symmetric indefinite matrices using Bunch-Kaufman diagonal pivoting.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l^{} = U_l^{} D_l^{} U_l^T & \: \text{or}\\ A_l^{} = L_l^{} D_l^{} L_l^T & \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(U_l\) or \(L_l\) is a product of permutation and unit upper/lower triangular matrices (depending on the value of uplo), and \(D_l\) is a symmetric block diagonal matrix with 1-by-1 and 2-by-2 diagonal blocks \(D_{kl}\).

Specifically, \(U_l\) and \(L_l\) are computed as

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l = P_l(n) U_l(n) \cdots P_l(k) U_l(k) \cdots & \: \text{and}\\ L_l = P_l(1) L_l(1) \cdots P_l(k) L_l(k) \cdots & \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(k\) decreases from \(n\) to 1 (increases from 1 to \(n\)) in steps of 1 or 2, depending on the order of block \(D_{kl}\), and \(P_l(k)\) is a permutation matrix defined by \(ipiv_l[k]\). If we let \(s\) denote the order of block \(D_{kl}\), then \(U_l(k)\) and \(L_l(k)\) are unit upper/lower triangular matrices defined as

\[\begin{split} U_l(k) = \left[ \begin{array}{ccc} I_{k-s} & v & 0 \\ 0 & I_s & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & I_{n-k} \end{array} \right] \end{split}\]and

\[\begin{split} L_l(k) = \left[ \begin{array}{ccc} I_{k-1} & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & I_s & 0 \\ 0 & v & I_{n-k-s+1} \end{array} \right]. \end{split}\]If \(s = 1\), then \(D_{kl}\) is stored in \(A_l[k,k]\) and \(v\) is stored in the upper/lower part of column \(k\) of \(A_l\). If \(s = 2\) and uplo is upper, then \(D_{kl}\) is stored in \(A_l[k-1,k-1]\), \(A_l[k-1,k]\), and \(A_l[k,k]\), and \(v\) is stored in the upper parts of columns \(k-1\) and \(k\) of \(A_l\). If \(s = 2\) and uplo is lower, then \(D_{kl}\) is stored in \(A_l[k,k]\), \(A_l[k+1,k]\), and \(A_l[k+1,k+1]\), and \(v\) is stored in the lower parts of columns \(k\) and \(k+1\) of \(A_l\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrices A_l are stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of all matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the symmetric matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the block diagonal matrices D_l and the multipliers needed to compute U_l or L_l.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU of dimension n. The vector of pivot indices. Elements of ipiv are 1-based indices. For 1 <= k <= n, if ipiv_l[k] > 0 then rows and columns k and ipiv_l[k] were interchanged and D_l[k,k] is a 1-by-1 diagonal block. If, instead, ipiv_l[k] = ipiv_l[k-1] < 0 and uplo is upper (or ipiv_l[k] = ipiv_l[k+1] < 0 and uplo is lower), then rows and columns k-1 and -ipiv_l[k] (or rows and columns k+1 and -ipiv_l[k]) were interchanged and D_l[k-1,k-1] to D_l[k,k] (or D_l[k,k] to D_l[k+1,k+1]) is a 2-by-2 diagonal block.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= n.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for factorization of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, D_l is singular. D_l[i,i] is the first diagonal zero.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zsytf2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_zsytf2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_csytf2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_csytf2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsytf2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_dsytf2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)
