[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssytf2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_ssytf2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) SYTF2_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the factorization of a batch of symmetric indefinite matrices using Bunch-Kaufman diagonal pivoting.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l^{} = U_l^{} D_l^{} U_l^T & \: \text{or}\\ A_l^{} = L_l^{} D_l^{} L_l^T & \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(U_l\) or \(L_l\) is a product of permutation and unit upper/lower triangular matrices (depending on the value of uplo), and \(D_l\) is a symmetric block diagonal matrix with 1-by-1 and 2-by-2 diagonal blocks \(D_{kl}\).

Specifically, \(U_l\) and \(L_l\) are computed as

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l = P_l(n) U_l(n) \cdots P_l(k) U_l(k) \cdots & \: \text{and}\\ L_l = P_l(1) L_l(1) \cdots P_l(k) L_l(k) \cdots & \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(k\) decreases from \(n\) to 1 (increases from 1 to \(n\)) in steps of 1 or 2, depending on the order of block \(D_{kl}\), and \(P_l(k)\) is a permutation matrix defined by \(ipiv_l[k]\). If we let \(s\) denote the order of block \(D_{kl}\), then \(U_l(k)\) and \(L_l(k)\) are unit upper/lower triangular matrices defined as

\[\begin{split} U_l(k) = \left[ \begin{array}{ccc} I_{k-s} & v & 0 \\ 0 & I_s & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & I_{n-k} \end{array} \right] \end{split}\]and

\[\begin{split} L_l(k) = \left[ \begin{array}{ccc} I_{k-1} & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & I_s & 0 \\ 0 & v & I_{n-k-s+1} \end{array} \right]. \end{split}\]If \(s = 1\), then \(D_{kl}\) is stored in \(A_l[k,k]\) and \(v\) is stored in the upper/lower part of column \(k\) of \(A_l\). If \(s = 2\) and uplo is upper, then \(D_{kl}\) is stored in \(A_l[k-1,k-1]\), \(A_l[k-1,k]\), and \(A_l[k,k]\), and \(v\) is stored in the upper parts of columns \(k-1\) and \(k\) of \(A_l\). If \(s = 2\) and uplo is lower, then \(D_{kl}\) is stored in \(A_l[k,k]\), \(A_l[k+1,k]\), and \(A_l[k+1,k+1]\), and \(v\) is stored in the lower parts of columns \(k\) and \(k+1\) of \(A_l\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrices A_l are stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of all matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the symmetric matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the block diagonal matrices D_l and the multipliers needed to compute U_l or L_l.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU of dimension n. The vector of pivot indices. Elements of ipiv are 1-based indices. For 1 <= k <= n, if ipiv_l[k] > 0 then rows and columns k and ipiv_l[k] were interchanged and D_l[k,k] is a 1-by-1 diagonal block. If, instead, ipiv_l[k] = ipiv_l[k-1] < 0 and uplo is upper (or ipiv_l[k] = ipiv_l[k+1] < 0 and uplo is lower), then rows and columns k-1 and -ipiv_l[k] (or rows and columns k+1 and -ipiv_l[k]) were interchanged and D_l[k-1,k-1] to D_l[k,k] (or D_l[k,k] to D_l[k+1,k+1]) is a 2-by-2 diagonal block.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= n.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for factorization of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, D_l is singular. D_l[i,i] is the first diagonal zero.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zsytrf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zsytrf14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_csytrf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_csytrf14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsytrf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dsytrf14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssytrf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_ssytrf14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int) SYTRF computes the factorization of a symmetric indefinite matrix \(A\) using Bunch-Kaufman diagonal pivoting.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A = U D U^T & \: \text{or}\\ A = L D L^T & \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(U\) or \(L\) is a product of permutation and unit upper/lower triangular matrices (depending on the value of uplo), and \(D\) is a symmetric block diagonal matrix with 1-by-1 and 2-by-2 diagonal blocks \(D_k\).

Specifically, \(U\) and \(L\) are computed as

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U = P(n) U(n) \cdots P(k) U(k) \cdots & \: \text{and}\\ L = P(1) L(1) \cdots P(k) L(k) \cdots & \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(k\) decreases from \(n\) to 1 (increases from 1 to \(n\)) in steps of 1 or 2, depending on the order of block \(D_k\), and \(P(k)\) is a permutation matrix defined by \(ipiv[k]\). If we let \(s\) denote the order of block \(D_k\), then \(U(k)\) and \(L(k)\) are unit upper/lower triangular matrices defined as

\[\begin{split} U(k) = \left[ \begin{array}{ccc} I_{k-s} & v & 0 \\ 0 & I_s & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & I_{n-k} \end{array} \right] \end{split}\]and

\[\begin{split} L(k) = \left[ \begin{array}{ccc} I_{k-1} & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & I_s & 0 \\ 0 & v & I_{n-k-s+1} \end{array} \right]. \end{split}\]If \(s = 1\), then \(D_k\) is stored in \(A[k,k]\) and \(v\) is stored in the upper/lower part of column \(k\) of \(A\). If \(s = 2\) and uplo is upper, then \(D_k\) is stored in \(A[k-1,k-1]\), \(A[k-1,k]\), and \(A[k,k]\), and \(v\) is stored in the upper parts of columns \(k-1\) and \(k\) of \(A\). If \(s = 2\) and uplo is lower, then \(D_k\) is stored in \(A[k,k]\), \(A[k+1,k]\), and \(A[k+1,k+1]\), and \(v\) is stored in the lower parts of columns \(k\) and \(k+1\) of \(A\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrix A is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the symmetric matrix A to be factored. On exit, the block diagonal matrix D and the multipliers needed to compute U or L.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU of dimension n. The vector of pivot indices. Elements of ipiv are 1-based indices. For 1 <= k <= n, if ipiv[k] > 0 then rows and columns k and ipiv[k] were interchanged and D[k,k] is a 1-by-1 diagonal block. If, instead, ipiv[k] = ipiv[k-1] < 0 and uplo is upper (or ipiv[k] = ipiv[k+1] < 0 and uplo is lower), then rows and columns k-1 and -ipiv[k] (or rows and columns k+1 and -ipiv[k]) were interchanged and D[k-1,k-1] to D[k,k] (or D[k,k] to D[k+1,k+1]) is a 2-by-2 diagonal block.**info**–**[out]**pointer to a rocblas_int on the GPU. If info = 0, successful exit. If info = i > 0, D is singular. D[i,i] is the first diagonal zero.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zsytrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zsytrf_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_csytrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_csytrf_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsytrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dsytrf_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssytrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_ssytrf_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) SYTRF_BATCHED computes the factorization of a batch of symmetric indefinite matrices using Bunch-Kaufman diagonal pivoting.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l^{} = U_l^{} D_l^{} U_l^T & \: \text{or}\\ A_l^{} = L_l^{} D_l^{} L_l^T & \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(U_l\) or \(L_l\) is a product of permutation and unit upper/lower triangular matrices (depending on the value of uplo), and \(D_l\) is a symmetric block diagonal matrix with 1-by-1 and 2-by-2 diagonal blocks \(D_{kl}\).

Specifically, \(U_l\) and \(L_l\) are computed as

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l = P_l(n) U_l(n) \cdots P_l(k) U_l(k) \cdots & \: \text{and}\\ L_l = P_l(1) L_l(1) \cdots P_l(k) L_l(k) \cdots & \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(k\) decreases from \(n\) to 1 (increases from 1 to \(n\)) in steps of 1 or 2, depending on the order of block \(D_{kl}\), and \(P_l(k)\) is a permutation matrix defined by \(ipiv_l[k]\). If we let \(s\) denote the order of block \(D_{kl}\), then \(U_l(k)\) and \(L_l(k)\) are unit upper/lower triangular matrices defined as

\[\begin{split} U_l(k) = \left[ \begin{array}{ccc} I_{k-s} & v & 0 \\ 0 & I_s & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & I_{n-k} \end{array} \right] \end{split}\]and

\[\begin{split} L_l(k) = \left[ \begin{array}{ccc} I_{k-1} & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & I_s & 0 \\ 0 & v & I_{n-k-s+1} \end{array} \right]. \end{split}\]If \(s = 1\), then \(D_{kl}\) is stored in \(A_l[k,k]\) and \(v\) is stored in the upper/lower part of column \(k\) of \(A_l\). If \(s = 2\) and uplo is upper, then \(D_{kl}\) is stored in \(A_l[k-1,k-1]\), \(A_l[k-1,k]\), and \(A_l[k,k]\), and \(v\) is stored in the upper parts of columns \(k-1\) and \(k\) of \(A_l\). If \(s = 2\) and uplo is lower, then \(D_{kl}\) is stored in \(A_l[k,k]\), \(A_l[k+1,k]\), and \(A_l[k+1,k+1]\), and \(v\) is stored in the lower parts of columns \(k\) and \(k+1\) of \(A_l\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrices A_l are stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of all matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the symmetric matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the block diagonal matrices D_l and the multipliers needed to compute U_l or L_l.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU of dimension n. The vector of pivot indices. Elements of ipiv are 1-based indices. For 1 <= k <= n, if ipiv_l[k] > 0 then rows and columns k and ipiv_l[k] were interchanged and D_l[k,k] is a 1-by-1 diagonal block. If, instead, ipiv_l[k] = ipiv_l[k-1] < 0 and uplo is upper (or ipiv_l[k] = ipiv_l[k+1] < 0 and uplo is lower), then rows and columns k-1 and -ipiv_l[k] (or rows and columns k+1 and -ipiv_l[k]) were interchanged and D_l[k-1,k-1] to D_l[k,k] (or D_l[k,k] to D_l[k+1,k+1]) is a 2-by-2 diagonal block.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= n.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for factorization of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, D_l is singular. D_l[i,i] is the first diagonal zero.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zsytrf_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_zsytrf_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssytrf_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_ssytrf_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) SYTRF_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the factorization of a batch of symmetric indefinite matrices using Bunch-Kaufman diagonal pivoting.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l^{} = U_l^{} D_l^{} U_l^T & \: \text{or}\\ A_l^{} = L_l^{} D_l^{} L_l^T & \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(U_l\) or \(L_l\) is a product of permutation and unit upper/lower triangular matrices (depending on the value of uplo), and \(D_l\) is a symmetric block diagonal matrix with 1-by-1 and 2-by-2 diagonal blocks \(D_{kl}\).

Specifically, \(U_l\) and \(L_l\) are computed as

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l = P_l(n) U_l(n) \cdots P_l(k) U_l(k) \cdots & \: \text{and}\\ L_l = P_l(1) L_l(1) \cdots P_l(k) L_l(k) \cdots & \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(k\) decreases from \(n\) to 1 (increases from 1 to \(n\)) in steps of 1 or 2, depending on the order of block \(D_{kl}\), and \(P_l(k)\) is a permutation matrix defined by \(ipiv_l[k]\). If we let \(s\) denote the order of block \(D_{kl}\), then \(U_l(k)\) and \(L_l(k)\) are unit upper/lower triangular matrices defined as

\[\begin{split} U_l(k) = \left[ \begin{array}{ccc} I_{k-s} & v & 0 \\ 0 & I_s & 0 \\ 0 & 0 & I_{n-k} \end{array} \right] \end{split}\]and

\[\begin{split} L_l(k) = \left[ \begin{array}{ccc} I_{k-1} & 0 & 0 \\ 0 & I_s & 0 \\ 0 & v & I_{n-k-s+1} \end{array} \right]. \end{split}\]If \(s = 1\), then \(D_{kl}\) is stored in \(A_l[k,k]\) and \(v\) is stored in the upper/lower part of column \(k\) of \(A_l\). If \(s = 2\) and uplo is upper, then \(D_{kl}\) is stored in \(A_l[k-1,k-1]\), \(A_l[k-1,k]\), and \(A_l[k,k]\), and \(v\) is stored in the upper parts of columns \(k-1\) and \(k\) of \(A_l\). If \(s = 2\) and uplo is lower, then \(D_l(k)\) is stored in \(A_l[k,k]\), \(A_l[k+1,k]\), and \(A_l[k+1,k+1]\), and \(v\) is stored in the lower parts of columns \(k\) and \(k+1\) of \(A_l\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrices A_l are stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of all matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the symmetric matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the block diagonal matrices D_l and the multipliers needed to compute U_l or L_l.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU of dimension n. The vector of pivot indices. Elements of ipiv are 1-based indices. For 1 <= k <= n, if ipiv_l[k] > 0 then rows and columns k and ipiv_l[k] were interchanged and D_l[k,k] is a 1-by-1 diagonal block. If, instead, ipiv_l[k] = ipiv_l[k-1] < 0 and uplo is upper (or ipiv_l[k] = ipiv_l[k+1] < 0 and uplo is lower), then rows and columns k-1 and -ipiv_l[k] (or rows and columns k+1 and -ipiv_l[k]) were interchanged and D_l[k-1,k-1] to D_l[k,k] (or D_l[k,k] to D_l[k+1,k+1]) is a 2-by-2 diagonal block.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= n.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for factorization of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, D_l is singular. D_l[i,i] is the first diagonal zero.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgeqr2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zgeqr214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complex)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgeqr2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_cgeqr214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complex)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgeqr2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgeqr214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPd)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgeqr2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgeqr214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPf) GEQR2 computes a QR factorization of a general m-by-n matrix A.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[\begin{split} A = Q\left[\begin{array}{c} R\\ 0 \end{array}\right] \end{split}\]where R is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m < n), and Q is a m-by-m orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q = H(1)H(2)\cdots H(k), \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n) \]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) is given by

\[ H(i) = I - \text{ipiv}[i] \cdot v_i^{} v_i' \]where the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of the matrix A.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrix to be factored. On exit, the elements on and above the diagonal contain the factor R; the elements below the diagonal are the last m - i elements of Householder vector v_i.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The Householder scalars.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgeqr2_batched_64([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const int64_t m, const int64_t n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const int64_t lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const int64_t batch_count)[#](#_CPPv427rocsolver_zgeqr2_batched_6414rocblas_handleK7int64_tK7int64_tA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK7int64_tP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK7int64_t)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgeqr2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_cgeqr2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgeqr2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dgeqr2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgeqr2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgeqr2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GEQR2_BATCHED computes the QR factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[\begin{split} A_l = Q_l\left[\begin{array}{c} R_l\\ 0 \end{array}\right] \end{split}\]where \(R_l\) is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m < n), and \(Q_l\) is a m-by-m orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(k), \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n) \]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where the first i-1 elements of Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and above the diagonal contain the factor R_l. The elements below the diagonal are the last m - i elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgeqr2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_zgeqr2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgeqr2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_cgeqr2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP21rocblas_float_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgeqr2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, double *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_dgeqr2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgeqr2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgeqr2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GEQR2_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the QR factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[\begin{split} A_l = Q_l\left[\begin{array}{c} R_l\\ 0 \end{array}\right] \end{split}\]where \(R_l\) is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m < n), and \(Q_l\) is a m-by-m orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(k), \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n) \]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where the first i-1 elements of Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and above the diagonal contain the factor R_l. The elements below the diagonal are the last m - i elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgeqrf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgeqrf14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPd)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgeqrf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgeqrf14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPf) GEQRF computes a QR factorization of a general m-by-n matrix A.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[\begin{split} A = Q\left[\begin{array}{c} R\\ 0 \end{array}\right] \end{split}\]where R is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m < n), and Q is a m-by-m orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q = H(1)H(2)\cdots H(k), \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n) \]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) is given by

\[ H(i) = I - \text{ipiv}[i] \cdot v_i^{} v_i' \]where the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of the matrix A.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrix to be factored. On exit, the elements on and above the diagonal contain the factor R; the elements below the diagonal are the last m - i elements of Householder vector v_i.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The Householder scalars.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgeqrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zgeqrf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgeqrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_cgeqrf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgeqrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dgeqrf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgeqrf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgeqrf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GEQRF_BATCHED computes the QR factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[\begin{split} A_l = Q_l\left[\begin{array}{c} R_l\\ 0 \end{array}\right] \end{split}\]where \(R_l\) is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m < n), and \(Q_l\) is a m-by-m orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(k), \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n) \]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where the first i-1 elements of Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and above the diagonal contain the factor R_l. The elements below the diagonal are the last m - i elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgeqrf_strided_batched_64([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const int64_t m, const int64_t n, double *A, const int64_t lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, double *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const int64_t batch_count)[#](#_CPPv435rocsolver_dgeqrf_strided_batched_6414rocblas_handleK7int64_tK7int64_tPdK7int64_tK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideK7int64_t)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgeqrf_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgeqrf_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GEQRF_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the QR factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[\begin{split} A_l = Q_l\left[\begin{array}{c} R_l\\ 0 \end{array}\right] \end{split}\]where \(R_l\) is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m < n), and \(Q_l\) is a m-by-m orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(k), \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n) \]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where the first i-1 elements of Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and above the diagonal contain the factor R_l. The elements below the diagonal are the last m - i elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgerq2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zgerq214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complex)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgerq2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_cgerq214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complex)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgerq2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgerq214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPd)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgerq2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgerq214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPf) GERQ2 computes a RQ factorization of a general m-by-n matrix A.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[ A = \left[\begin{array}{cc} 0 & R \end{array}\right] Q \]where R is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m > n), and Q is a n-by-n orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q = H(1)'H(2)' \cdots H(k)', \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n). \]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) is given by

\[ H(i) = I - \text{ipiv}[i] \cdot v_i^{} v_i' \]where the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of the matrix A.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrix to be factored. On exit, the elements on and above the (m-n)-th subdiagonal (when m >= n) or the (n-m)-th superdiagonal (when n > m) contain the factor R; the elements below the sub/superdiagonal are the first i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_i.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The Householder scalars.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgerq2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zgerq2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgerq2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dgerq2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgerq2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgerq2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GERQ2_BATCHED computes the RQ factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[ A_l = \left[\begin{array}{cc} 0 & R_l \end{array}\right] Q_l \]where \(R_l\) is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m > n), and \(Q_l\) is a n-by-n orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(1)'H_l(2)' \cdots H_l(k)', \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n). \]Each Householder matrices \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where the last n-i elements of Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and above the (m-n)-th subdiagonal (when m >= n) or the (n-m)-th superdiagonal (when n > m) contain the factor R_l; the elements below the sub/superdiagonal are the first i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgerq2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_zgerq2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgerq2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgerq2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GERQ2_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the RQ factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[ A_l = \left[\begin{array}{cc} 0 & R_l \end{array}\right] Q_l \]where \(R_l\) is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m > n), and \(Q_l\) is a n-by-n orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(1)'H_l(2)' \cdots H_l(k)', \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n). \]Each Householder matrices \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where the last n-i elements of Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and above the (m-n)-th subdiagonal (when m >= n) or the (n-m)-th superdiagonal (when n > m) contain the factor R_l; the elements below the sub/superdiagonal are the first i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgerqf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgerqf14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPd)
