[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgerqf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgerqf14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPf) GERQF computes a RQ factorization of a general m-by-n matrix A.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[ A = \left[\begin{array}{cc} 0 & R \end{array}\right] Q \]where R is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m > n), and Q is a n-by-n orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q = H(1)'H(2)' \cdots H(k)', \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n). \]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) is given by

\[ H(i) = I - \text{ipiv}[i] \cdot v_i^{} v_i' \]where the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of the matrix A.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrix to be factored. On exit, the elements on and above the (m-n)-th subdiagonal (when m >= n) or the (n-m)-th superdiagonal (when n > m) contain the factor R; the elements below the sub/superdiagonal are the first i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_i.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The Householder scalars.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgerqf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zgerqf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgerqf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_cgerqf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgerqf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dgerqf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgerqf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgerqf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GERQF_BATCHED computes the RQ factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[ A_l = \left[\begin{array}{cc} 0 & R_l \end{array}\right] Q_l \]where \(R_l\) is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m > n), and \(Q_l\) is a n-by-n orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(1)'H_l(2)' \cdots H_l(k)', \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n). \]Each Householder matrices \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where the last n-i elements of Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and above the (m-n)-th subdiagonal (when m >= n) or the (n-m)-th superdiagonal (when n > m) contain the factor R_l; the elements below the sub/superdiagonal are the first i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgerqf_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_zgerqf_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgerqf_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, double *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_dgerqf_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgerqf_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgerqf_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GERQF_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the RQ factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[ A_l = \left[\begin{array}{cc} 0 & R_l \end{array}\right] Q_l \]where \(R_l\) is upper triangular (upper trapezoidal if m > n), and \(Q_l\) is a n-by-n orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(1)'H_l(2)' \cdots H_l(k)', \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n). \]Each Householder matrices \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where the last n-i elements of Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and above the (m-n)-th subdiagonal (when m >= n) or the (n-m)-th superdiagonal (when n > m) contain the factor R_l; the elements below the sub/superdiagonal are the first i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgeql2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgeql214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPd)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgeql2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgeql214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPf) GEQL2 computes a QL factorization of a general m-by-n matrix A.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[\begin{split} A = Q\left[\begin{array}{c} 0\\ L \end{array}\right] \end{split}\]where L is lower triangular (lower trapezoidal if m < n), and Q is a m-by-m orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q = H(k)H(k-1)\cdots H(1), \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n) \]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) is given by

\[ H(i) = I - \text{ipiv}[i] \cdot v_i^{} v_i' \]where the last m-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of the matrix A.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrix to be factored. On exit, the elements on and below the (m-n)-th subdiagonal (when m >= n) or the (n-m)-th superdiagonal (when n > m) contain the factor L; the elements above the sub/superdiagonal are the first i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_i.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The Householder scalars.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgeql2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zgeql2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgeql2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dgeql2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgeql2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgeql2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GEQL2_BATCHED computes the QL factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[\begin{split} A_l = Q_l\left[\begin{array}{c} 0\\ L_l \end{array}\right] \end{split}\]where \(L_l\) is lower triangular (lower trapezoidal if m < n), and \(Q_l\) is a m-by-m orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(k)H_l(k-1)\cdots H_l(1), \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n) \]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where the last m-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and below the (m-n)-th subdiagonal (when m >= n) or the (n-m)-th superdiagonal (when n > m) contain the factor L_l; the elements above the sub/superdiagonal are the first i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgeql2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_zgeql2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgeql2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgeql2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GEQL2_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the QL factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[\begin{split} A_l = Q_l\left[\begin{array}{c} 0\\ L_l \end{array}\right] \end{split}\]where \(L_l\) is lower triangular (lower trapezoidal if m < n), and \(Q_l\) is a m-by-m orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(k)H_l(k-1)\cdots H_l(1), \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n) \]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where the last m-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and below the (m-n)-th subdiagonal (when m >= n) or the (n-m)-th superdiagonal (when n > m) contain the factor L_l; the elements above the sub/superdiagonal are the first i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgeqlf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgeqlf14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPd)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgeqlf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgeqlf14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPf) GEQLF computes a QL factorization of a general m-by-n matrix A.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[\begin{split} A = Q\left[\begin{array}{c} 0\\ L \end{array}\right] \end{split}\]where L is lower triangular (lower trapezoidal if m < n), and Q is a m-by-m orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q = H(k)H(k-1)\cdots H(1), \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n) \]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) is given by

\[ H(i) = I - \text{ipiv}[i] \cdot v_i^{} v_i' \]where the last m-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of the matrix A.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrix to be factored. On exit, the elements on and below the (m-n)-th subdiagonal (when m >= n) or the (n-m)-th superdiagonal (when n > m) contain the factor L; the elements above the sub/superdiagonal are the first i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_i.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The Householder scalars.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgeqlf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zgeqlf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgeqlf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dgeqlf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgeqlf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgeqlf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GEQLF_BATCHED computes the QL factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[\begin{split} A_l = Q_l\left[\begin{array}{c} 0\\ L_l \end{array}\right] \end{split}\]where \(L_l\) is lower triangular (lower trapezoidal if m < n), and \(Q_l\) is a m-by-m orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(k)H_l(k-1)\cdots H_l(1), \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n) \]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where the last m-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and below the (m-n)-th subdiagonal (when m >= n) or the (n-m)-th superdiagonal (when n > m) contain the factor L_l; the elements above the sub/superdiagonal are the first i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgeqlf_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgeqlf_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GEQLF_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the QL factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[\begin{split} A_l = Q_l\left[\begin{array}{c} 0\\ L_l \end{array}\right] \end{split}\]where \(L_l\) is lower triangular (lower trapezoidal if m < n), and \(Q_l\) is a m-by-m orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(k)H_l(k-1)\cdots H_l(1), \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n) \]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where the last m-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and below the (m-n)-th subdiagonal (when m >= n) or the (n-m)-th superdiagonal (when n > m) contain the factor L_l; the elements above the sub/superdiagonal are the first i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgelq2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgelq214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPd)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgelq2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgelq214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPf) GELQ2 computes a LQ factorization of a general m-by-n matrix A.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[ A = \left[\begin{array}{cc} L & 0 \end{array}\right] Q \]where L is lower triangular (lower trapezoidal if m > n), and Q is a n-by-n orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q = H(k)'H(k-1)' \cdots H(1)', \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n). \]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) is given by

\[ H(i) = I - \text{ipiv}[i] \cdot v_i' v_i^{} \]where the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of the matrix A.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrix to be factored. On exit, the elements on and below the diagonal contain the factor L; the elements above the diagonal are the last n - i elements of Householder vector v_i.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The Householder scalars.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgelq2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zgelq2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgelq2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dgelq2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgelq2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgelq2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GELQ2_BATCHED computes the LQ factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[ A_l = \left[\begin{array}{cc} L_l & 0 \end{array}\right] Q_l \]where \(L_l\) is lower triangular (lower trapezoidal if m > n), and \(Q_l\) is a n-by-n orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(k)'H_l(k-1)' \cdots H_l(1)', \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n). \]Each Householder matrices \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}' v_{l_i}^{} \]where the first i-1 elements of Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and below the diagonal contain the factor L_l. The elements above the diagonal are the last n - i elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgelq2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_zgelq2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgelq2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgelq2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GELQ2_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the LQ factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[ A_l = \left[\begin{array}{cc} L_l & 0 \end{array}\right] Q_l \]where \(L_l\) is lower triangular (lower trapezoidal if m > n), and \(Q_l\) is a n-by-n orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(k)'H_l(k-1)' \cdots H_l(1)', \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n). \]Each Householder matrices \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}' v_{l_i}^{} \]where the first i-1 elements of Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and below the diagonal contain the factor L_l. The elements above the diagonal are the last n - i elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgelqf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgelqf14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPd)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgelqf([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgelqf14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPf) GELQF computes a LQ factorization of a general m-by-n matrix A.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization has the form

\[ A = \left[\begin{array}{cc} L & 0 \end{array}\right] Q \]where L is lower triangular (lower trapezoidal if m > n), and Q is a n-by-n orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q = H(k)'H(k-1)' \cdots H(1)', \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n). \]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) is given by

\[ H(i) = I - \text{ipiv}[i] \cdot v_i' v_i^{} \]where the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of the matrix A.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrix to be factored. On exit, the elements on and below the diagonal contain the factor L; the elements above the diagonal are the last n - i elements of Householder vector v_i.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The Householder scalars.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgelqf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zgelqf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgelqf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_cgelqf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgelqf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dgelqf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgelqf_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgelqf_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GELQF_BATCHED computes the LQ factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[ A_l = \left[\begin{array}{cc} L_l & 0 \end{array}\right] Q_l \]where \(L_l\) is lower triangular (lower trapezoidal if m > n), and \(Q_l\) is a n-by-n orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(k)'H_l(k-1)' \cdots H_l(1)', \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n). \]Each Householder matrices \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}' v_{l_i}^{} \]where the first i-1 elements of Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and below the diagonal contain the factor L_l. The elements above the diagonal are the last n - i elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgelqf_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgelqf_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GELQF_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the LQ factorization of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The factorization of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch has the form

\[ A_l = \left[\begin{array}{cc} L_l & 0 \end{array}\right] Q_l \]where \(L_l\) is lower triangular (lower trapezoidal if m > n), and \(Q_l\) is a n-by-n orthogonal/unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[ Q_l = H_l(k)'H_l(k-1)' \cdots H_l(1)', \quad \text{with} \: k = \text{min}(m,n). \]Each Householder matrices \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{ipiv}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}' v_{l_i}^{} \]where the first i-1 elements of Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on and below the diagonal contain the factor L_l. The elements above the diagonal are the last n - i elements of Householder vector v_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgebd2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, double *E,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*tauq,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*taup)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zgebd214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intPdPdP22rocblas_double_complexP22rocblas_double_complex)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgebd2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, float *E,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*tauq,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*taup)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_cgebd214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intPfPfP21rocblas_float_complexP21rocblas_float_complex)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgebd2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, double *E, double *tauq, double *taup)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgebd214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPdPdPdPd)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgebd2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, float *E, float *tauq, float *taup)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgebd214rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPfPfPfPf) GEBD2 computes the bidiagonal form of a general m-by-n matrix A.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The bidiagonal form is given by:

\[ B = Q' A P \]where B is upper bidiagonal if m >= n and lower bidiagonal if m < n, and Q and P are orthogonal/unitary matrices represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q = H(1)H(2)\cdots H(n)\: \text{and} \: P = G(1)G(2)\cdots G(n-1), & \: \text{if}\: m >= n, \:\text{or}\\ Q = H(1)H(2)\cdots H(m-1)\: \text{and} \: P = G(1)G(2)\cdots G(m), & \: \text{if}\: m < n. \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) and \(G(i)\) is given by

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} H(i) = I - \text{tauq}[i] \cdot v_i^{} v_i', & \: \text{and}\\ G(i) = I - \text{taup}[i] \cdot u_i' u_i^{}. \end{array} \end{split}\]If m >= n, the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\); while the first i elements of the Householder vector \(u_i\) are zero, and \(u_i[i+1] = 1\). If m < n, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i+1] = 1\); while the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(u_i\) are zero, and \(u_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of the matrix A.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrix to be factored. On exit, the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal (if m >= n), or subdiagonal (if m < n) contain the bidiagonal form B. If m >= n, the elements below the diagonal are the last m - i elements of Householder vector v_i, and the elements above the superdiagonal are the last n - i - 1 elements of Householder vector u_i. If m < n, the elements below the subdiagonal are the last m - i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_i, and the elements above the diagonal are the last n - i elements of Householder vector u_i.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. specifies the leading dimension of A.**D**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The diagonal elements of B.**E**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n)-1. The off-diagonal elements of B.**tauq**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The Householder scalars associated with matrix Q.**taup**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The Householder scalars associated with matrix P.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgebd2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, double *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*tauq, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideQ,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*taup, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zgebd2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgebd2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, float *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*tauq, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideQ,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*taup, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_cgebd2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideP21rocblas_float_complexK14rocblas_strideP21rocblas_float_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)
