[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgebd2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, double *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, double *tauq, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideQ, double *taup, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dgebd2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgebd2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, float *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, float *tauq, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideQ, float *taup, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgebd2_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GEBD2_BATCHED computes the bidiagonal form of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

For each instance in the batch, the bidiagonal form is given by:

\[ B_l^{} = Q_l' A_l^{} P_l^{} \]where \(B_l\) is upper bidiagonal if m >= n and lower bidiagonal if m < n, and \(Q_l\) and \(P_l\) are orthogonal/unitary matrices represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(n)\: \text{and} \: P_l = G_l(1)G_l(2)\cdots G_l(n-1), & \: \text{if}\: m >= n, \:\text{or}\\ Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(m-1)\: \text{and} \: P_l = G_l(1)G_l(2)\cdots G_l(m), & \: \text{if}\: m < n. \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) and \(G_l(i)\) is given by

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{tauq}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}', & \: \text{and}\\ G_l^{}(i) = I - \text{taup}_l^{}[i] \cdot u_{l_i}' u_{l_i}^{}. \end{array} \end{split}\]If m >= n, the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\); while the first i elements of the Householder vector \(u_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(u_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\). If m < n, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\); while the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(u_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(u_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal (if m >= n), or subdiagonal (if m < n) contain the bidiagonal form B_l. If m >= n, the elements below the diagonal are the last m - i elements of Householder vector v_(l_i), and the elements above the superdiagonal are the last n - i - 1 elements of Householder vector u_(l_i). If m < n, the elements below the subdiagonal are the last m - i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_(l_i), and the elements above the diagonal are the last n - i elements of Householder vector u_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**D**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideD). The diagonal elements of B_l.**strideD**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector D_l to the next one D_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideD. Normal use case is strideD >= min(m,n).**E**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideE). The off-diagonal elements of B_l.**strideE**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector E_l to the next one E_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideE. Normal use case is strideE >= min(m,n)-1.**tauq**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideQ). Contains the vectors tauq_l of Householder scalars associated with matrices Q_l.**strideQ**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector tauq_l to the next one tauq_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideQ. Normal use is strideQ >= min(m,n).**taup**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors taup_l of Householder scalars associated with matrices P_l.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector taup_l to the next one taup_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgebd2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, float *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, float *tauq, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideQ, float *taup, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgebd2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GEBD2_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the bidiagonal form of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

For each instance in the batch, the bidiagonal form is given by:

\[ B_l^{} = Q_l' A_l^{} P_l^{} \]where \(B_l\) is upper bidiagonal if m >= n and lower bidiagonal if m < n, and \(Q_l\) and \(P_l\) are orthogonal/unitary matrices represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(n)\: \text{and} \: P_1 = G_l(1)G_l(2)\cdots G_l(n-1), & \: \text{if}\: m >= n, \:\text{or}\\ Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(m-1)\: \text{and} \: P_1 = G_l(1)G_l(2)\cdots G_l(m), & \: \text{if}\: m < n. \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) and \(G_l(i)\) is given by

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{tauq}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}', & \: \text{and}\\ G_l^{}(i) = I - \text{taup}_l^{}[i] \cdot u_{l_i}' u_{l_i}^{}. \end{array} \end{split}\]If m >= n, the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\); while the first i elements of the Householder vector \(u_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(u_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\). If m < n, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\); while the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(u_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(u_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal (if m >= n), or subdiagonal (if m < n) contain the bidiagonal form B_l. If m >= n, the elements below the diagonal are the last m - i elements of Householder vector v_(l_i), and the elements above the superdiagonal are the last n - i - 1 elements of Householder vector u_(l_i). If m < n, the elements below the subdiagonal are the last m - i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_(l_i), and the elements above the diagonal are the last n - i elements of Householder vector u_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**D**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideD). The diagonal elements of B_l.**strideD**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector D_l to the next one D_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideD. Normal use case is strideD >= min(m,n).**E**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideE). The off-diagonal elements of B_l.**strideE**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector E_l to the next one E_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideE. Normal use case is strideE >= min(m,n)-1.**tauq**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideQ). Contains the vectors tauq_l of Householder scalars associated with matrices Q_l.**strideQ**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector tauq_l to the next one tauq_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideQ. Normal use is strideQ >= min(m,n).**taup**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors taup_l of Householder scalars associated with matrices P_l.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector taup_l to the next one taup_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgebrd([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, double *E,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*tauq,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*taup)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zgebrd14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intPdPdP22rocblas_double_complexP22rocblas_double_complex)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgebrd([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, float *E,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*tauq,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*taup)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_cgebrd14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intPfPfP21rocblas_float_complexP21rocblas_float_complex)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgebrd([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, double *E, double *tauq, double *taup)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgebrd14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPdPdPdPd)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgebrd([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, float *E, float *tauq, float *taup)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgebrd14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPfPfPfPf) GEBRD computes the bidiagonal form of a general m-by-n matrix A.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The bidiagonal form is given by:

\[ B = Q' A P \]where B is upper bidiagonal if m >= n and lower bidiagonal if m < n, and Q and P are orthogonal/unitary matrices represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q = H(1)H(2)\cdots H(n)\: \text{and} \: P = G(1)G(2)\cdots G(n-1), & \: \text{if}\: m >= n, \:\text{or}\\ Q = H(1)H(2)\cdots H(m-1)\: \text{and} \: P = G(1)G(2)\cdots G(m), & \: \text{if}\: m < n. \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) and \(G(i)\) is given by

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} H(i) = I - \text{tauq}[i] \cdot v_i^{} v_i', & \: \text{and}\\ G(i) = I - \text{taup}[i] \cdot u_i' u_i^{}. \end{array} \end{split}\]If m >= n, the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\); while the first i elements of the Householder vector \(u_i\) are zero, and \(u_i[i+1] = 1\). If m < n, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i+1] = 1\); while the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(u_i\) are zero, and \(u_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of the matrix A.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrix to be factored. On exit, the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal (if m >= n), or subdiagonal (if m < n) contain the bidiagonal form B. If m >= n, the elements below the diagonal are the last m - i elements of Householder vector v_i, and the elements above the superdiagonal are the last n - i - 1 elements of Householder vector u_i. If m < n, the elements below the subdiagonal are the last m - i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_i, and the elements above the diagonal are the last n - i elements of Householder vector u_i.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. specifies the leading dimension of A.**D**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The diagonal elements of B.**E**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n)-1. The off-diagonal elements of B.**tauq**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The Householder scalars associated with matrix Q.**taup**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension min(m,n). The Householder scalars associated with matrix P.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgebrd_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, double *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*tauq, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideQ,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*taup, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zgebrd_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgebrd_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, float *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*tauq, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideQ,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*taup, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_cgebrd_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideP21rocblas_float_complexK14rocblas_strideP21rocblas_float_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgebrd_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, double *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, double *tauq, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideQ, double *taup, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dgebrd_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgebrd_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, float *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, float *tauq, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideQ, float *taup, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgebrd_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GEBRD_BATCHED computes the bidiagonal form of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

For each instance in the batch, the bidiagonal form is given by:

\[ B_l^{} = Q_l' A_l^{} P_l^{} \]where \(B_l\) is upper bidiagonal if m >= n and lower bidiagonal if m < n, and \(Q_l\) and \(P_l\) are orthogonal/unitary matrices represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(n)\: \text{and} \: P_l = G_l(1)G_l(2)\cdots G_l(n-1), & \: \text{if}\: m >= n, \:\text{or}\\ Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(m-1)\: \text{and} \: P_l = G_l(1)G_l(2)\cdots G_l(m), & \: \text{if}\: m < n. \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) and \(G_l(i)\) is given by

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{tauq}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}', & \: \text{and}\\ G_l^{}(i) = I - \text{taup}_l^{}[i] \cdot u_{l_i}' u_{l_i}^{}. \end{array} \end{split}\]If m >= n, the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\); while the first i elements of the Householder vector \(u_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(u_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\). If m < n, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\); while the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(u_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(u_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal (if m >= n), or subdiagonal (if m < n) contain the bidiagonal form B_l. If m >= n, the elements below the diagonal are the last m - i elements of Householder vector v_(l_i), and the elements above the superdiagonal are the last n - i - 1 elements of Householder vector u_(l_i). If m < n, the elements below the subdiagonal are the last m - i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_(l_i), and the elements above the diagonal are the last n - i elements of Householder vector u_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**D**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideD). The diagonal elements of B_l.**strideD**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector D_l to the next one D_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideD. Normal use case is strideD >= min(m,n).**E**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideE). The off-diagonal elements of B_l.**strideE**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector E_l to the next one E_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideE. Normal use case is strideE >= min(m,n)-1.**tauq**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideQ). Contains the vectors tauq_l of Householder scalars associated with matrices Q_l.**strideQ**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector tauq_l to the next one tauq_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideQ. Normal use is strideQ >= min(m,n).**taup**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors taup_l of Householder scalars associated with matrices P_l.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector taup_l to the next one taup_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgebrd_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, double *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, double *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*tauq, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideQ,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*taup, [rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgebrd_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, double *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, double *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, double *tauq, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideQ, double *taup, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_dgebrd_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgebrd_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, float *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, float *tauq, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideQ, float *taup, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgebrd_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GEBRD_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the bidiagonal form of a batch of general m-by-n matrices.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

For each instance in the batch, the bidiagonal form is given by:

\[ B_l^{} = Q_l' A_l^{} P_l^{} \]where \(B_l\) is upper bidiagonal if m >= n and lower bidiagonal if m < n, and \(Q_l\) and \(P_l\) are orthogonal/unitary matrices represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(n)\: \text{and} \: P_l = G_l(1)G_l(2)\cdots G_l(n-1), & \: \text{if}\: m >= n, \:\text{or}\\ Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(m-1)\: \text{and} \: P_l = G_l(1)G_l(2)\cdots G_l(m), & \: \text{if}\: m < n. \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) and \(G_l(i)\) is given by

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{tauq}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}', & \: \text{and}\\ G_l^{}(i) = I - \text{taup}_l^{}[i] \cdot u_{l_i}' u_{l_i}^{}. \end{array} \end{split}\]If m >= n, the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\); while the first i elements of the Householder vector \(u_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(u_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\). If m < n, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\); while the first i-1 elements of the Householder vector \(u_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(u_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all the matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the m-by-n matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal (if m >= n), or subdiagonal (if m < n) contain the bidiagonal form B_l. If m >= n, the elements below the diagonal are the last m - i elements of Householder vector v_(l_i), and the elements above the superdiagonal are the last n - i - 1 elements of Householder vector u_(l_i). If m < n, the elements below the subdiagonal are the last m - i - 1 elements of Householder vector v_(l_i), and the elements above the diagonal are the last n - i elements of Householder vector u_(l_i).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**D**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideD). The diagonal elements of B_l.**strideD**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector D_l to the next one D_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideD. Normal use case is strideD >= min(m,n).**E**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideE). The off-diagonal elements of B_l.**strideE**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector E_l to the next one E_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideE. Normal use case is strideE >= min(m,n)-1.**tauq**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideQ). Contains the vectors tauq_l of Householder scalars associated with matrices Q_l.**strideQ**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector tauq_l to the next one tauq_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideQ. Normal use is strideQ >= min(m,n).**taup**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors taup_l of Householder scalars associated with matrices P_l.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector taup_l to the next one taup_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= min(m,n).**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsytd2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, double *E, double *tau)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dsytd214rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPdPdPd)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssytd2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, float *E, float *tau)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_ssytd214rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPfPfPf) SYTD2 computes the tridiagonal form of a real symmetric matrix A.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The tridiagonal form is given by:

\[ T = Q' A Q \]where T is symmetric tridiagonal and Q is an orthogonal matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q = H(1)H(2)\cdots H(n-1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates lower, or}\\ Q = H(n-1)H(n-2)\cdots H(1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates upper.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) is given by

\[ H(i) = I - \text{tau}[i] \cdot v_i^{} v_i' \]where tau[i] is the corresponding Householder scalar. When uplo indicates lower, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i+1] = 1\). If uplo indicates upper, the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the symmetric matrix A is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrix to be factored. On exit, if upper, then the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T; the elements above the superdiagonal contain the first i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_i stored as columns. If lower, then the elements on the diagonal and subdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T; the elements below the subdiagonal contain the last n-i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_i stored as columns.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A.**D**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension n. The diagonal elements of T.**E**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension n-1. The off-diagonal elements of T.**tau**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension n-1. The Householder scalars.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsytd2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, double *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, double *tau, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dsytd2_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssytd2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, float *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, float *tau, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_ssytd2_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) SYTD2_BATCHED computes the tridiagonal form of a batch of real symmetric matrices A_l.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The tridiagonal form of \(A_l\) is given by:

\[ T_l^{} = Q_l' A_l^{} Q_l^{} \]where \(T_l\) is symmetric tridiagonal and \(Q_l\) is an orthogonal matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(n-1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates lower, or}\\ Q_l = H_l(n-1)H_l(n-2)\cdots H_l(1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates upper.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{tau}_l^{}[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where \(\text{tau}_l[i]\) is the corresponding Householder scalar. When uplo indicates lower, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\). If uplo indicates upper, the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the symmetric matrix A_l is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrices A_l.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, if upper, then the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements above the superdiagonal contain the first i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns. If lower, then the elements on the diagonal and subdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements below the subdiagonal contain the last n-i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A_l.**D**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideD). The diagonal elements of T_l.**strideD**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector D_l to the next one D_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideD. Normal use case is strideD >= n.**E**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideE). The off-diagonal elements of T_l.**strideE**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector E_l to the next one E_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideE. Normal use case is strideE >= n-1.**tau**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors tau_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector tau_l to the next one tau_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= n-1.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsytd2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, double *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, double *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, double *tau, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_dsytd2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssytd2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, float *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, float *tau, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_ssytd2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) SYTD2_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the tridiagonal form of a batch of real symmetric matrices A_l.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The tridiagonal form of \(A_l\) is given by:

\[ T_l^{} = Q_l' A_l^{} Q_l^{} \]where \(T_l\) is symmetric tridiagonal and \(Q_l\) is an orthogonal matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(n-1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates lower, or}\\ Q_l = H_l(n-1)H_l(n-2)\cdots H_l(1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates upper.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{tau}_l[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where \(\text{tau}_l[i]\) is the corresponding Householder scalar. When uplo indicates lower, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\). If uplo indicates upper, the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the symmetric matrix A_l is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrices A_l.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, if upper, then the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements above the superdiagonal contain the first i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns. If lower, then the elements on the diagonal and subdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements below the subdiagonal contain the last n-i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**D**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideD). The diagonal elements of T_l.**strideD**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector D_l to the next one D_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideD. Normal use case is strideD >= n.**E**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideE). The off-diagonal elements of T_l.**strideE**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector E_l to the next one E_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideE. Normal use case is strideE >= n-1.**tau**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors tau_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector tau_l to the next one tau_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= n-1.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zhetd2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, double *E,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*tau)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zhetd214rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intPdPdP22rocblas_double_complex)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_chetd2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, float *E,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*tau)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_chetd214rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intPfPfP21rocblas_float_complex) HETD2 computes the tridiagonal form of a complex hermitian matrix A.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The tridiagonal form is given by:

\[ T = Q' A Q \]where T is hermitian tridiagonal and Q is an unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q = H(1)H(2)\cdots H(n-1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates lower, or}\\ Q = H(n-1)H(n-2)\cdots H(1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates upper.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) is given by

\[ H(i) = I - \text{tau}[i] \cdot v_i^{} v_i' \]where tau[i] is the corresponding Householder scalar. When uplo indicates lower, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i+1] = 1\). If uplo indicates upper, the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the hermitian matrix A is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrix to be factored. On exit, if upper, then the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T; the elements above the superdiagonal contain the first i-1 elements of the Householders vector v_i stored as columns. If lower, then the elements on the diagonal and subdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T; the elements below the subdiagonal contain the last n-i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_i stored as columns.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A.**D**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU of dimension n. The diagonal elements of T.**E**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU of dimension n-1. The off-diagonal elements of T.**tau**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension n-1. The Householder scalars.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zhetd2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, double *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*tau, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zhetd2_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_chetd2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, float *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*tau, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_chetd2_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideP21rocblas_float_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) HETD2_BATCHED computes the tridiagonal form of a batch of complex hermitian matrices A_l.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The tridiagonal form of \(A_l\) is given by:

\[ T_l^{} = Q_l' A_l^{} Q_l^{} \]where \(T_l\) is Hermitian tridiagonal and \(Q_l\) is a unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(n-1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates lower, or}\\ Q_l = H_l(n-1)H_l(n-2)\cdots H_l(1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates upper.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{tau}_l[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where \(\text{tau}_l[i]\) is the corresponding Householder scalar. When uplo indicates lower, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\). If uplo indicates upper, the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the hermitian matrix A_l is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrices A_l.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, if upper, then the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements above the superdiagonal contain the first i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns. If lower, then the elements on the diagonal and subdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements below the subdiagonal contain the last n-i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A_l.**D**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideD). The diagonal elements of T_l.**strideD**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector D_l to the next one D_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideD. Normal use case is strideD >= n.**E**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideE). The off-diagonal elements of T_l.**strideE**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector E_l to the next one E_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideE. Normal use case is strideE >= n-1.**tau**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors tau_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector tau_l to the next one tau_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= n-1.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The tridiagonal form of \(A_l\) is given by:

\[ T_l^{} = Q_l' A_l^{} Q_l^{} \]where \(T_l\) is Hermitian tridiagonal and \(Q_l\) is a unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(n-1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates lower, or}\\ Q_l = H_l(n-1)H_l(n-2)\cdots H_l(1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates upper.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{tau}_l[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where \(\text{tau}_l[i]\) is the corresponding Householder scalar. When uplo indicates lower, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\). If uplo indicates upper, the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the hermitian matrix A_l is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrices A_l.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, if upper, then the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements above the superdiagonal contain the first i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns. If lower, then the elements on the diagonal and subdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements below the subdiagonal contain the last n-i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**D**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideD). The diagonal elements of T_l.**strideD**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector D_l to the next one D_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideD. Normal use case is strideD >= n.**E**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideE). The off-diagonal elements of T_l.**strideE**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector E_l to the next one E_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideE. Normal use case is strideE >= n-1.**tau**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors tau_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector tau_l to the next one tau_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= n-1.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsytrd([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, double *E, double *tau)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dsytrd14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPdPdPd)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssytrd([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, float *E, float *tau)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_ssytrd14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPfPfPf) SYTRD computes the tridiagonal form of a real symmetric matrix A.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The tridiagonal form is given by:

\[ T = Q' A Q \]where T is symmetric tridiagonal and Q is an orthogonal matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q = H(1)H(2)\cdots H_(n-1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates lower, or}\\ Q = H(n-1)H(n-2)\cdots H(1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates upper.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) is given by

\[ H(i) = I - \text{tau}[i] \cdot v_i^{} v_i' \]where tau[i] is the corresponding Householder scalar. When uplo indicates lower, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i+1] = 1\). If uplo indicates upper, the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the symmetric matrix A is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrix to be factored. On exit, if upper, then the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T; the elements above the superdiagonal contain the first i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_i stored as columns. If lower, then the elements on the diagonal and subdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T; the elements below the subdiagonal contain the last n-i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_i stored as columns.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A.**D**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension n. The diagonal elements of T.**E**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension n-1. The off-diagonal elements of T.**tau**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension n-1. The Householder scalars.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsytrd_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, double *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, double *tau, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dsytrd_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssytrd_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, float *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, float *tau, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_ssytrd_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) SYTRD_BATCHED computes the tridiagonal form of a batch of real symmetric matrices A_l.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The tridiagonal form of \(A_l\) is given by:

\[ T_l^{} = Q_l' A_l^{} Q_l^{} \]where \(T_l\) is symmetric tridiagonal and \(Q_l\) is an orthogonal matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(n-1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates lower, or}\\ Q_l = H_l(n-1)H_l(n-2)\cdots H_l(1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates upper.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{tau}_l[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where \(\text{tau}_l[i]\) is the corresponding Householder scalar. When uplo indicates lower, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\). If uplo indicates upper, the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the symmetric matrix A_l is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrices A_l.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, if upper, then the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements above the superdiagonal contain the first i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns. If lower, then the elements on the diagonal and subdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements below the subdiagonal contain the last n-i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A_l.**D**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideD). The diagonal elements of T_l.**strideD**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector D_l to the next one D_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideD. Normal use case is strideD >= n.**E**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideE). The off-diagonal elements of T_l.**strideE**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector E_l to the next one E_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideE. Normal use case is strideE >= n-1.**tau**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors tau_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector tau_l to the next one tau_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= n-1.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
