[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssytrd_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, float *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE, float *tau, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_ssytrd_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) SYTRD_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the tridiagonal form of a batch of real symmetric matrices A_l.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The tridiagonal form of \(A_l\) is given by:

\[ T_l^{} = Q_l' A_l^{} Q_l^{} \]where \(T_l\) is symmetric tridiagonal and \(Q_l\) is an orthogonal matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(n-1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates lower, or}\\ Q_l = H_l(n-1)H_l(n-2)\cdots H_l(1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates upper.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{tau}_l[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where \(\text{tau}_l[i]\) is the corresponding Householder scalar. When uplo indicates lower, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\). If uplo indicates upper, the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the symmetric matrix A_l is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrices A_l.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, if upper, then the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements above the superdiagonal contain the first i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns. If lower, then the elements on the diagonal and subdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements below the subdiagonal contain the last n-i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**D**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideD). The diagonal elements of T_l.**strideD**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector D_l to the next one D_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideD. Normal use case is strideD >= n.**E**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideE). The off-diagonal elements of T_l.**strideE**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector E_l to the next one E_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideE. Normal use case is strideE >= n-1.**tau**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors tau_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector tau_l to the next one tau_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= n-1.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zhetrd([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, double *E,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*tau)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zhetrd14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intPdPdP22rocblas_double_complex)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_chetrd([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, float *E,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*tau)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_chetrd14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intPfPfP21rocblas_float_complex) HETRD computes the tridiagonal form of a complex hermitian matrix A.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The tridiagonal form is given by:

\[ T = Q' A Q \]where T is hermitian tridiagonal and Q is an unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q = H(1)H(2)\cdots H(n-1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates lower, or}\\ Q = H(n-1)H(n-2)\cdots H(1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates upper.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H(i)\) is given by

\[ H(i) = I - \text{tau}[i] \cdot v_i^{} v_i' \]where tau[i] is the corresponding Householder scalar. When uplo indicates lower, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i+1] = 1\). If uplo indicates upper, the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_i\) are zero, and \(v_i[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the hermitian matrix A is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrix to be factored. On exit, if upper, then the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T; the elements above the superdiagonal contain the first i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_i stored as columns. If lower, then the elements on the diagonal and subdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T; the elements below the subdiagonal contain the last n-i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_i stored as columns.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A.**D**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU of dimension n. The diagonal elements of T.**E**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU of dimension n-1. The off-diagonal elements of T.**tau**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension n-1. The Householder scalars.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zhetrd_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, double *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*tau, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zhetrd_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intPdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_chetrd_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, float *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*tau, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_chetrd_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intPfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideP21rocblas_float_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) HETRD_BATCHED computes the tridiagonal form of a batch of complex hermitian matrices A_l.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The tridiagonal form of \(A_l\) is given by:

\[ T_l^{} = Q_l' A_l^{} Q_l^{} \]where \(T_l\) is Hermitian tridiagonal and \(Q_l\) is a unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(n-1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates lower, or}\\ Q_l = H_l(n-1)H_l(n-2)\cdots H_l(1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates upper.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{tau}_l[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where \(\text{tau}_l[i]\) is the corresponding Householder scalar. When uplo indicates lower, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\). If uplo indicates upper, the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the hermitian matrix A_l is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrices A_l.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, if upper, then the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements above the superdiagonal contain the first i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns. If lower, then the elements on the diagonal and subdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements below the subdiagonal contain the last n-i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A_l.**D**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideD). The diagonal elements of T_l.**strideD**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector D_l to the next one D_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideD. Normal use case is strideD >= n.**E**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideE). The off-diagonal elements of T_l.**strideE**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector E_l to the next one E_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideE. Normal use case is strideE >= n-1.**tau**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors tau_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector tau_l to the next one tau_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= n-1.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zhetrd_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, double *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, double *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*tau, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_zhetrd_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_stridePdK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_chetrd_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *D, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideD, float *E, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideE,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*tau, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_chetrd_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_stridePfK14rocblas_strideP21rocblas_float_complexK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) HETRD_STRIDED_BATCHED computes the tridiagonal form of a batch of complex hermitian matrices A_l.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The tridiagonal form of \(A_l\) is given by:

\[ T_l^{} = Q_l' A_l^{} Q_l^{} \]where \(T_l\) is Hermitian tridiagonal and \(Q_l\) is a unitary matrix represented as the product of Householder matrices

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} Q_l = H_l(1)H_l(2)\cdots H_l(n-1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates lower, or}\\ Q_l = H_l(n-1)H_l(n-2)\cdots H_l(1) & \: \text{if uplo indicates upper.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Each Householder matrix \(H_l(i)\) is given by

\[ H_l^{}(i) = I - \text{tau}_l[i] \cdot v_{l_i}^{} v_{l_i}' \]where \(\text{tau}_l[i]\) is the corresponding Householder scalar. When uplo indicates lower, the first i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i+1] = 1\). If uplo indicates upper, the last n-i elements of the Householder vector \(v_{l_i}\) are zero, and \(v_{l_i}[i] = 1\).

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the hermitian matrix A_l is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrices A_l.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the matrices A_l to be factored. On exit, if upper, then the elements on the diagonal and superdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements above the superdiagonal contain the first i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns. If lower, then the elements on the diagonal and subdiagonal contain the tridiagonal form T_l; the elements below the subdiagonal contain the last n-i-1 elements of the Householder vectors v_(l_i) stored as columns.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**D**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideD). The diagonal elements of T_l.**strideD**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector D_l to the next one D_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideD. Normal use case is strideD >= n.**E**–**[out]**pointer to real type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideE). The off-diagonal elements of T_l.**strideE**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector E_l to the next one E_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideE. Normal use case is strideE >= n-1.**tau**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors tau_l of corresponding Householder scalars.**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector tau_l to the next one tau_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use is strideP >= n-1.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsygs2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dsygs214rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssygs2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_ssygs214rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_int) SYGS2 reduces a real symmetric-definite generalized eigenproblem to standard form.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A X = \lambda B X & \: \text{1st form,}\\ A B X = \lambda X & \: \text{2nd form, or}\\ B A X = \lambda X & \: \text{3rd form,} \end{array} \end{split}\]depending on the value of itype.

If the problem is of the 1st form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U^{-T} A U^{-1}, & \: \text{or}\\ L^{-1} A L^{-T}, \end{array} \end{split}\]where the symmetric-definite matrix B has been factorized as either \(U^T U\) or \(L L^T\) as returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f), depending on the value of uplo.If the problem is of the 2nd or 3rd form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U A U^T, & \: \text{or}\\ L^T A L, \end{array} \end{split}\]also depending on the value of uplo.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**itype**–**[in]**[rocblas_eform](types.html#rocsolver-extra-types_8h_1a1dd267d37dbe5c1b6e5edeb7996beda8). Specifies the form of the generalized eigenproblem.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrix A is stored, and whether the factorization applied to B was upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) parts of A and B are not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The matrix dimensions.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrix A. On exit, the transformed matrix associated with the equivalent standard eigenvalue problem.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**B**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension ldb*n. The triangular factor of the matrix B, as returned by[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f).**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of B.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsygs2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dsygs2_batched14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssygs2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_ssygs2_batched14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) SYGS2_BATCHED reduces a batch of real symmetric-definite generalized eigenproblems to standard form.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

For each instance in the batch, the problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l X_l = \lambda B_l X_l & \: \text{1st form,}\\ A_l B_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{2nd form, or}\\ B_l A_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{3rd form,} \end{array} \end{split}\]depending on the value of itype.

If the problem is of the 1st form, then \(A_l\) is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{-T} A_l^{} U_l^{-1}, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^{-1} A_l^{} L_l^{-T}, \end{array} \end{split}\]where the symmetric-definite matrix \(B_l\) has been factorized as either \(U_l^T U_l^{}\) or \(L_l^{} L_l^T\) as returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f), depending on the value of uplo.If the problem is of the 2nd or 3rd form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{} A_l^{} U_l^T, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^T A_l^{} L_l^{}, \end{array} \end{split}\]also depending on the value of uplo.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**itype**–**[in]**[rocblas_eform](types.html#rocsolver-extra-types_8h_1a1dd267d37dbe5c1b6e5edeb7996beda8). Specifies the form of the generalized eigenproblems.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrices A_l are stored, and whether the factorization applied to B_l was upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) parts of A_l and B_l are not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The matrix dimensions.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrices A_l. On exit, the transformed matrices associated with the equivalent standard eigenvalue problems.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**B**–**[out]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension ldb*n. The triangular factors of the matrices B_l, as returned by[POTRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a64637bff034365c2667eca3721eff4a9).**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of B_l.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsygs2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, double *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_dsygs2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssygs2_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_ssygs2_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) SYGS2_STRIDED_BATCHED reduces a batch of real symmetric-definite generalized eigenproblems to standard form.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

For each instance in the batch, the problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l X_l = \lambda B_l X_l & \: \text{1st form,}\\ A_l B_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{2nd form, or}\\ B_l A_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{3rd form,} \end{array} \end{split}\]depending on the value of itype.

If the problem is of the 1st form, then \(A_l\) is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{-T} A_l^{} U_l^{-1}, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^{-1} A_l^{} L_l^{-T}, \end{array} \end{split}\]where the symmetric-definite matrix \(B_l\) has been factorized as either \(U_l^T U_l^{}\) or \(L_l^{} L_l^T\) as returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f), depending on the value of uplo.If the problem is of the 2nd or 3rd form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{} A_l^{} U_l^T, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^T A_l^{} L_l^{}, \end{array} \end{split}\]also depending on the value of uplo.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**itype**–**[in]**[rocblas_eform](types.html#rocsolver-extra-types_8h_1a1dd267d37dbe5c1b6e5edeb7996beda8). Specifies the form of the generalized eigenproblems.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrices A_l are stored, and whether the factorization applied to B_l was upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) parts of A_l and B_l are not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The matrix dimensions.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the matrices A_l. On exit, the transformed matrices associated with the equivalent standard eigenvalue problems.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**B**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideB). The triangular factors of the matrices B_l, as returned by[POTRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a62177c8dae1549385502c300b7a4724a).**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of B_l.**strideB**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix B_l to the next one B_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideB. Normal use case is strideB >= ldb*n.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zhegs2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zhegs214rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_chegs2([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_chegs214rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_int) HEGS2 reduces a hermitian-definite generalized eigenproblem to standard form.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

The problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A X = \lambda B X & \: \text{1st form,}\\ A B X = \lambda X & \: \text{2nd form, or}\\ B A X = \lambda X & \: \text{3rd form,} \end{array} \end{split}\]depending on the value of itype.

If the problem is of the 1st form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U^{-H} A U^{-1}, & \: \text{or}\\ L^{-1} A L^{-H}, \end{array} \end{split}\]where the hermitian-definite matrix B has been factorized as either \(U^H U\) or \(L L^H\) as returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f), depending on the value of uplo.If the problem is of the 2nd or 3rd form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U A U^H, & \: \text{or}\\ L^H A L, \end{array} \end{split}\]also depending on the value of uplo.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**itype**–**[in]**[rocblas_eform](types.html#rocsolver-extra-types_8h_1a1dd267d37dbe5c1b6e5edeb7996beda8). Specifies the form of the generalized eigenproblem.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrix A is stored, and whether the factorization applied to B was upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) parts of A and B are not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The matrix dimensions.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrix A. On exit, the transformed matrix associated with the equivalent standard eigenvalue problem.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**B**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension ldb*n. The triangular factor of the matrix B, as returned by[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f).**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of B.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zhegs2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zhegs2_batched14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_chegs2_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_chegs2_batched14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) HEGS2_BATCHED reduces a batch of hermitian-definite generalized eigenproblems to standard form.

(This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

For each instance in the batch, the problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l X_l = \lambda B_l X_l & \: \text{1st form,}\\ A_l B_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{2nd form, or}\\ B_l A_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{3rd form,} \end{array} \end{split}\]depending on the value of itype.

If the problem is of the 1st form, then \(A_l\) is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{-H} A_l^{} U_l^{-1}, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^{-1} A_l^{} L_l^{-H}, \end{array} \end{split}\]where the hermitian-definite matrix \(B_l\) has been factorized as either \(U_l^H U_l^{}\) or \(L_l^{} L_l^H\) as returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f), depending on the value of uplo.If the problem is of the 2nd or 3rd form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{} A_l^{} U_l^H, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^H A_l^{} L_l^{}, \end{array} \end{split}\]also depending on the value of uplo.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**itype**–**[in]**[rocblas_eform](types.html#rocsolver-extra-types_8h_1a1dd267d37dbe5c1b6e5edeb7996beda8). Specifies the form of the generalized eigenproblems.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrices A_l are stored, and whether the factorization applied to B_l was upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) parts of A_l and B_l are not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The matrix dimensions.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrices A_l. On exit, the transformed matrices associated with the equivalent standard eigenvalue problems.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**B**–**[out]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension ldb*n. (This is the unblocked version of the algorithm).

For each instance in the batch, the problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l X_l = \lambda B_l X_l & \: \text{1st form,}\\ A_l B_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{2nd form, or}\\ B_l A_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{3rd form,} \end{array} \end{split}\]depending on the value of itype.

If the problem is of the 1st form, then \(A_l\) is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{-H} A_l^{} U_l^{-1}, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^{-1} A_l^{} L_l^{-H}, \end{array} \end{split}\]where the hermitian-definite matrix \(B_l\) has been factorized as either \(U_l^H U_l^{}\) or \(L_l^{} L_l^H\) as returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f), depending on the value of uplo.If the problem is of the 2nd or 3rd form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{} A_l^{} U_l^H, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^H A_l^{} L_l^{}, \end{array} \end{split}\]also depending on the value of uplo.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**itype**–**[in]**[rocblas_eform](types.html#rocsolver-extra-types_8h_1a1dd267d37dbe5c1b6e5edeb7996beda8). Specifies the form of the generalized eigenproblems.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrices A_l are stored, and whether the factorization applied to B_l was upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) parts of A_l and B_l are not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The matrix dimensions.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the matrices A_l. On exit, the transformed matrices associated with the equivalent standard eigenvalue problems.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**B**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideB). The triangular factors of the matrices B_l, as returned by[POTRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a62177c8dae1549385502c300b7a4724a).**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of B_l.**strideB**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix B_l to the next one B_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideB. Normal use case is strideB >= ldb*n.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsygst([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dsygst14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssygst([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_ssygst14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_int) SYGST reduces a real symmetric-definite generalized eigenproblem to standard form.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A X = \lambda B X & \: \text{1st form,}\\ A B X = \lambda X & \: \text{2nd form, or}\\ B A X = \lambda X & \: \text{3rd form,} \end{array} \end{split}\]depending on the value of itype.

If the problem is of the 1st form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U^{-T} A U^{-1}, & \: \text{or}\\ L^{-1} A L^{-T}, \end{array} \end{split}\]where the symmetric-definite matrix B has been factorized as either \(U^T U\) or \(L L^T\) as returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f), depending on the value of uplo.If the problem is of the 2nd or 3rd form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U A U^T, & \: \text{or}\\ L^T A L, \end{array} \end{split}\]also depending on the value of uplo.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**itype**–**[in]**[rocblas_eform](types.html#rocsolver-extra-types_8h_1a1dd267d37dbe5c1b6e5edeb7996beda8). Specifies the form of the generalized eigenproblem.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrix A is stored, and whether the factorization applied to B was upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) parts of A and B are not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The matrix dimensions.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrix A. On exit, the transformed matrix associated with the equivalent standard eigenvalue problem.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**B**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension ldb*n. The triangular factor of the matrix B, as returned by[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f).**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of B.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dsygst_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dsygst_batched14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssygst_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_ssygst_batched14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) SYGST_BATCHED reduces a batch of real symmetric-definite generalized eigenproblems to standard form.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

For each instance in the batch, the problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l X_l = \lambda B_l X_l & \: \text{1st form,}\\ A_l B_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{2nd form, or}\\ B_l A_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{3rd form,} \end{array} \end{split}\]depending on the value of itype.

If the problem is of the 1st form, then \(A_l\) is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{-T} A_l^{} U_l^{-1}, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^{-1} A_l^{} L_l^{-T}, \end{array} \end{split}\]where the symmetric-definite matrix \(B_l\) has been factorized as either \(U_l^T U_l^{}\) or \(L_l^{} L_l^T\) as returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f), depending on the value of uplo.If the problem is of the 2nd or 3rd form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{} A_l^{} U_l^T, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^T A_l^{} L_l^{}, \end{array} \end{split}\]also depending on the value of uplo.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**itype**–**[in]**[rocblas_eform](types.html#rocsolver-extra-types_8h_1a1dd267d37dbe5c1b6e5edeb7996beda8). Specifies the form of the generalized eigenproblems.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrices A_l are stored, and whether the factorization applied to B_l was upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) parts of A_l and B_l are not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The matrix dimensions.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrices A_l. On exit, the transformed matrices associated with the equivalent standard eigenvalue problems.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**B**–**[out]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension ldb*n. The triangular factors of the matrices B_l, as returned by[POTRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a64637bff034365c2667eca3721eff4a9).**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of B_l.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ssygst_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_ssygst_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) SYGST_STRIDED_BATCHED reduces a batch of real symmetric-definite generalized eigenproblems to standard form.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

For each instance in the batch, the problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l X_l = \lambda B_l X_l & \: \text{1st form,}\\ A_l B_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{2nd form, or}\\ B_l A_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{3rd form,} \end{array} \end{split}\]depending on the value of itype.

If the problem is of the 1st form, then \(A_l\) is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{-T} A_l^{} U_l^{-1}, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^{-1} A_l^{} L_l^{-T}, \end{array} \end{split}\]where the symmetric-definite matrix \(B_l\) has been factorized as either \(U_l^T U_l^{}\) or \(L_l^{} L_l^T\) as returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f), depending on the value of uplo.If the problem is of the 2nd or 3rd form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{} A_l^{} U_l^T, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^T A_l^{} L_l^{}, \end{array} \end{split}\]also depending on the value of uplo.

If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) parts of A_l and B_l are not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The matrix dimensions.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the matrices A_l. On exit, the transformed matrices associated with the equivalent standard eigenvalue problems.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**B**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideB). [rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zhegst([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zhegst14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_chegst([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_chegst14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_int) HEGST reduces a hermitian-definite generalized eigenproblem to standard form.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

The problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A X = \lambda B X & \: \text{1st form,}\\ A B X = \lambda X & \: \text{2nd form, or}\\ B A X = \lambda X & \: \text{3rd form,} \end{array} \end{split}\]depending on the value of itype.

If the problem is of the 1st form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U^{-H} A U^{-1}, & \: \text{or}\\ L^{-1} A L^{-H}, \end{array} \end{split}\]where the hermitian-definite matrix B has been factorized as either \(U^H U\) or \(L L^H\) as returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f), depending on the value of uplo.If the problem is of the 2nd or 3rd form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U A U^H, & \: \text{or}\\ L^H A L, \end{array} \end{split}\]also depending on the value of uplo.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**itype**–**[in]**[rocblas_eform](types.html#rocsolver-extra-types_8h_1a1dd267d37dbe5c1b6e5edeb7996beda8). Specifies the form of the generalized eigenproblem.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrix A is stored, and whether the factorization applied to B was upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) parts of A and B are not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The matrix dimensions.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrix A. On exit, the transformed matrix associated with the equivalent standard eigenvalue problem.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**B**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension ldb*n. The triangular factor of the matrix B, as returned by[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f).**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of B.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zhegst_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zhegst_batched14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_chegst_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_chegst_batched14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) HEGST_BATCHED reduces a batch of hermitian-definite generalized eigenproblems to standard form.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

For each instance in the batch, the problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l X_l = \lambda B_l X_l & \: \text{1st form,}\\ A_l B_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{2nd form, or}\\ B_l A_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{3rd form,} \end{array} \end{split}\]depending on the value of itype.

If the problem is of the 1st form, then \(A_l\) is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{-H} A_l^{} U_l^{-1}, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^{-1} A_l^{} L_l^{-H}, \end{array} \end{split}\]where the hermitian-definite matrix \(B_l\) has been factorized as either \(U_l^H U_l^{}\) or \(L_l^{} L_l^H\) as returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f), depending on the value of uplo.If the problem is of the 2nd or 3rd form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{} A_l^{} U_l^H, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^H A_l^{} L_l^{}, \end{array} \end{split}\]also depending on the value of uplo.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**itype**–**[in]**[rocblas_eform](types.html#rocsolver-extra-types_8h_1a1dd267d37dbe5c1b6e5edeb7996beda8). Specifies the form of the generalized eigenproblems.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrices A_l are stored, and whether the factorization applied to B_l was upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) parts of A_l and B_l are not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The matrix dimensions.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrices A_l. On exit, the transformed matrices associated with the equivalent standard eigenvalue problems.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**B**–**[out]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension ldb*n. The triangular factors of the matrices B_l, as returned by[POTRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a64637bff034365c2667eca3721eff4a9).**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of B_l.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zhegst_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_zhegst_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_chegst_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_eform](types.html#_CPPv413rocblas_eform)itype, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_chegst_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK13rocblas_eformK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) HEGST_STRIDED_BATCHED reduces a batch of hermitian-definite generalized eigenproblems to standard form.

(This is the blocked version of the algorithm).

For each instance in the batch, the problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l X_l = \lambda B_l X_l & \: \text{1st form,}\\ A_l B_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{2nd form, or}\\ B_l A_l X_l = \lambda X_l & \: \text{3rd form,} \end{array} \end{split}\]depending on the value of itype.

If the problem is of the 1st form, then \(A_l\) is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{-H} A_l^{} U_l^{-1}, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^{-1} A_l^{} L_l^{-H}, \end{array} \end{split}\]where the hermitian-definite matrix \(B_l\) has been factorized as either \(U_l^H U_l^{}\) or \(L_l^{} L_l^H\) as returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f), depending on the value of uplo.If the problem is of the 2nd or 3rd form, then A is overwritten with

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} U_l^{} A_l^{} U_l^H, & \: \text{or}\\ L_l^H A_l^{} L_l^{}, \end{array} \end{split}\]also depending on the value of uplo.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**itype**–**[in]**[rocblas_eform](types.html#rocsolver-extra-types_8h_1a1dd267d37dbe5c1b6e5edeb7996beda8). Specifies the form of the generalized eigenproblems.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrices A_l are stored, and whether the factorization applied to B_l was upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) parts of A_l and B_l are not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The matrix dimensions.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the matrices A_l. On exit, the transformed matrices associated with the equivalent standard eigenvalue problems.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**B**–**[out]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideB). The triangular factors of the matrices B_l, as returned by[POTRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a62177c8dae1549385502c300b7a4724a).**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of B_l.**strideB**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix B_l to the next one B_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideB. Normal use case is strideB >= ldb*n.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dtrtri([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_diagonal](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv416rocblas_diagonal)diag, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dtrtri14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK16rocblas_diagonalK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)
