[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_strtri([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_diagonal](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv416rocblas_diagonal)diag, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_strtri14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK16rocblas_diagonalK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int) TRTRI inverts a triangular n-by-n matrix A.

A can be upper or lower triangular, depending on the value of uplo, and unit or non-unit triangular, depending on the value of diag.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrix A is stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A is not used.**diag**–**[in]**rocblas_diagonal. If diag indicates unit, then the diagonal elements of A are not referenced and assumed to be one.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the triangular matrix. On exit, the inverse of A if info = 0.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**info**–**[out]**pointer to a rocblas_int on the GPU. If info = 0, successful exit. If info = i > 0, A is singular. A[i,i] is the first zero element in the diagonal.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ztrtri_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_diagonal](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv416rocblas_diagonal)diag, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_ztrtri_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK16rocblas_diagonalK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dtrtri_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_diagonal](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv416rocblas_diagonal)diag, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dtrtri_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK16rocblas_diagonalK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_strtri_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_diagonal](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv416rocblas_diagonal)diag, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_strtri_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK16rocblas_diagonalK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) TRTRI_BATCHED inverts a batch of triangular n-by-n matrices \(A_l\).

\(A_l\) can be upper or lower triangular, depending on the value of uplo, and unit or non-unit triangular, depending on the value of diag.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrices A_l are stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**diag**–**[in]**rocblas_diagonal. If diag indicates unit, then the diagonal elements of matrices A_l are not referenced and assumed to be one.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of all matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the triangular matrices A_l. On exit, the inverses of A_l if info[l] = 0.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for inversion of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, A_l is singular. A_l[i,i] is the first zero element in the diagonal.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_ztrtri_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_diagonal](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv416rocblas_diagonal)diag, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_ztrtri_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK16rocblas_diagonalK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dtrtri_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_diagonal](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv416rocblas_diagonal)diag, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_dtrtri_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK16rocblas_diagonalK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_strtri_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_diagonal](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv416rocblas_diagonal)diag, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_strtri_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK16rocblas_diagonalK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) TRTRI_STRIDED_BATCHED inverts a batch of triangular n-by-n matrices \(A_l\).

\(A_l\) can be upper or lower triangular, depending on the value of uplo, and unit or non-unit triangular, depending on the value of diag.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the upper or lower part of the matrices A_l are stored. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**diag**–**[in]**rocblas_diagonal. If diag indicates unit, then the diagonal elements of matrices A_l are not referenced and assumed to be one.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of all matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the triangular matrices A_l. On exit, the inverses of A_l if info[l] = 0.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for inversion of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, A_l is singular. A_l[i,i] is the first zero element in the diagonal.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgetri([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgetri14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetri([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgetri14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int) GETRI inverts a general n-by-n matrix A using the LU factorization computed by

[GETRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a75c831efc81b0f80f726d71a79d31b91).The inverse is computed by solving the linear system

\[ A^{-1}L = U^{-1} \]where L is the lower triangular factor of A with unit diagonal elements, and U is the upper triangular factor.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of the matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the factors L and U of the factorization A = P*L*U returned by[GETRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a75c831efc81b0f80f726d71a79d31b91). On exit, the inverse of A if info = 0; otherwise undefined.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[in]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU of dimension n. The pivot indices returned by[GETRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a75c831efc81b0f80f726d71a79d31b91).**info**–**[out]**pointer to a rocblas_int on the GPU. If info = 0, successful exit. If info = i > 0, U is singular. U[i,i] is the first zero pivot.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgetri_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zgetri_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgetri_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dgetri_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetri_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgetri_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) GETRI_BATCHED inverts a batch of general n-by-n matrices using the LU factorization computed by

[GETRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1afaaeb3de3f891c4b2b3bb0925abce18a).The inverse of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch is computed by solving the linear system

\[ A_l^{-1} L_l^{} = U_l^{-1} \]where \(L_l\) is the lower triangular factor of \(A_l\) with unit diagonal elements, and \(U_l\) is the upper triangular factor.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of all matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the factors L_l and U_l of the factorization A_l = P_l*L_l*U_l returned by[GETRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1afaaeb3de3f891c4b2b3bb0925abce18a). On exit, the inverses of A_l if info[l] = 0; otherwise undefined.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[in]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). The pivot indices returned by[GETRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1afaaeb3de3f891c4b2b3bb0925abce18a).**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+j). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= n.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for inversion of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, U_l is singular. U_l[i,i] is the first zero pivot.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgetri_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_zgetri_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgetri_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_dgetri_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetri_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgetri_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) GETRI_STRIDED_BATCHED inverts a batch of general n-by-n matrices using the LU factorization computed by

[GETRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1ae0feab0135a20479c7bb954b3348261d).The inverse of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch is computed by solving the linear system

\[ A_l^{-1} L_l^{} = U_l^{-1} \]where \(L_l\) is the lower triangular factor of \(A_l\) with unit diagonal elements, and \(U_l\) is the upper triangular factor.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of all matrices A_l in the batch.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the factors L_l and U_l of the factorization A_l = P_l*L_l*U_l returned by[GETRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1ae0feab0135a20479c7bb954b3348261d). On exit, the inverses of A_l if info[l] = 0; otherwise undefined.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n**ipiv**–**[in]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). The pivot indices returned by[GETRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1ae0feab0135a20479c7bb954b3348261d).**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= n.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for inversion of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, U_l is singular. U_l[i,i] is the first zero pivot.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgetrs([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zgetrs14rocblas_handleK17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intPK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgetrs([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, double *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dgetrs14rocblas_handleK17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetrs([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, float *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_sgetrs14rocblas_handleK17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_int) GETRS solves a system of n linear equations on n variables in its factorized form.

It solves one of the following systems, depending on the value of trans:

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A X = B & \: \text{not transposed,}\\ A^T X = B & \: \text{transposed, or}\\ A^H X = B & \: \text{conjugate transposed.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Matrix A is defined by its triangular factors as returned by

[GETRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a75c831efc81b0f80f726d71a79d31b91).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**trans**–**[in]**rocblas_operation. Specifies the form of the system of equations.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The order of the system, i.e. the number of columns and rows of A.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of right hand sides, i.e., the number of columns of the matrix B.**A**–**[in]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. The factors L and U of the factorization A = P*L*U returned by[GETRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a75c831efc81b0f80f726d71a79d31b91).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[in]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU of dimension n. The pivot indices returned by[GETRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a75c831efc81b0f80f726d71a79d31b91).**B**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension ldb*nrhs. On entry, the right hand side matrix B. On exit, the solution matrix X.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. The leading dimension of B.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetrs_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, float *const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_sgetrs_batched14rocblas_handleK17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intPK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideA_PCfK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) GETRS_BATCHED solves a batch of systems of n linear equations on n variables in its factorized forms.

For each instance l in the batch, it solves one of the following systems, depending on the value of trans:

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l X_l = B_l & \: \text{not transposed,}\\ A_l^T X_l^{} = B_l^{} & \: \text{transposed, or}\\ A_l^H X_l^{} = B_l^{} & \: \text{conjugate transposed.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Matrix \(A_l\) is defined by its triangular factors as returned by

[GETRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1afaaeb3de3f891c4b2b3bb0925abce18a).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**trans**–**[in]**rocblas_operation. Specifies the form of the system of equations of each instance in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The order of the system, i.e. the number of columns and rows of all A_l matrices.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of right hand sides, i.e., the number of columns of all the matrices B_l.**A**–**[in]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. The factors L_l and U_l of the factorization A_l = P_l*L_l*U_l returned by[GETRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1afaaeb3de3f891c4b2b3bb0925abce18a).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[in]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of pivot indices returned by[GETRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1afaaeb3de3f891c4b2b3bb0925abce18a).**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= n.**B**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension ldb*nrhs. On entry, the right hand side matrices B_l. On exit, the solution matrix X_l of each system in the batch.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. The leading dimension of matrices B_l.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of instances (systems) in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgetrs_strided_batched_64([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const int64_t n, const int64_t nrhs,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const int64_t lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, const int64_t *ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*B, const int64_t ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB, const int64_t batch_count)[#](#_CPPv435rocsolver_zgetrs_strided_batched_6414rocblas_handleK17rocblas_operationK7int64_tK7int64_tP22rocblas_double_complexK7int64_tK14rocblas_stridePK7int64_tK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK7int64_tK14rocblas_strideK7int64_t)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgetrs_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, double *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_dgetrs_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgetrs_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, float *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_sgetrs_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) GETRS_STRIDED_BATCHED solves a batch of systems of n linear equations on n variables in its factorized forms.

For each instance l in the batch, it solves one of the following systems, depending on the value of trans:

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l X_l = B_l & \: \text{not transposed,}\\ A_l^T X_l^{} = B_l^{} & \: \text{transposed, or}\\ A_l^H X_l^{} = B_l^{} & \: \text{conjugate transposed.} \end{array} \end{split}\]Matrix \(A_l\) is defined by its triangular factors as returned by

[GETRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1ae0feab0135a20479c7bb954b3348261d).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**trans**–**[in]**rocblas_operation. Specifies the form of the system of equations of each instance in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The order of the system, i.e. the number of columns and rows of all A_l matrices.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of right hand sides, i.e., the number of columns of all the matrices B_l.**A**–**[in]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). The factors L_l and U_l of the factorization A_l = P_l*L_l*U_l returned by[GETRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1ae0feab0135a20479c7bb954b3348261d).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**ipiv**–**[in]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). Contains the vectors ipiv_l of pivot indices returned by[GETRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1ae0feab0135a20479c7bb954b3348261d).**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= n.**B**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (size depends on the value of strideB). On entry, the right hand side matrices B_l. On exit, the solution matrix X_l of each system in the batch.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. The leading dimension of matrices B_l.**strideB**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix B_l to the next one B_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideB. Normal use case is strideB >= ldb*nrhs.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of instances (systems) in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgesv([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv415rocsolver_zgesv14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgesv([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv415rocsolver_cgesv14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgesv([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, double *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv415rocsolver_dgesv14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgesv([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, float *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv415rocsolver_sgesv14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int) GESV solves a general system of n linear equations on n variables.

The linear system is of the form

\[ A X = B \]where A is a general n-by-n matrix. Matrix A is first factorized in triangular factors L and U using

[GETRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a75c831efc81b0f80f726d71a79d31b91); then, the solution is computed with[GETRS](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a4852aa28474bd3056f3bc8365a4e0c22).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The order of the system, i.e. the number of columns and rows of A.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of right hand sides, i.e., the number of columns of the matrix B.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrix A. On exit, if info = 0, the factors L and U of the LU decomposition of A returned by[GETRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a75c831efc81b0f80f726d71a79d31b91).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU of dimension n. The pivot indices returned by[GETRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a75c831efc81b0f80f726d71a79d31b91).**B**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension ldb*nrhs. On entry, the right hand side matrix B. On exit, the solution matrix X.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. The leading dimension of B.**info**–**[out]**pointer to a rocblas_int on the GPU. If info = 0, successful exit. If info = i > 0, U is singular, and the solution could not be computed. U[i,i] is the first zero element in the diagonal.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgesv_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv423rocsolver_zgesv_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgesv_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv423rocsolver_cgesv_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgesv_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, double *const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv423rocsolver_dgesv_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideA_PCdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgesv_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, float *const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv423rocsolver_sgesv_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideA_PCfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) GESV_BATCHED solves a batch of general systems of n linear equations on n variables.

The linear systems are of the form

\[ A_l X_l = B_l \]where \(A_l\) is a general n-by-n matrix. Matrix \(A_l\) is first factorized in triangular factors \(L_l\) and \(U_l\) using

[GETRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1afaaeb3de3f891c4b2b3bb0925abce18a); then, the solutions are computed with[GETRS_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a6747c0acb3884ab535e803c09d1d1969).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The order of the system, i.e. the number of columns and rows of all A_l matrices.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of right hand sides, i.e., the number of columns of all the matrices B_l.**A**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrices A_l. On exit, if info[l] = 0, the factors L_l and U_l of the LU decomposition of A_l returned by[GETRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1afaaeb3de3f891c4b2b3bb0925abce18a).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of matrices A_l.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). The vectors ipiv_l of pivot indices returned by[GETRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1afaaeb3de3f891c4b2b3bb0925abce18a).**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= n.**B**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension ldb*nrhs. On entry, the right hand side matrices B_l. On exit, the solution matrix X_l of each system in the batch.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. The leading dimension of matrices B_l.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, U_l is singular, and the solution could not be computed. U_l[i,i] is the first zero element in the diagonal.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of instances (systems) in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgesv_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*ipiv, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideP, float *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv431rocsolver_sgesv_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) GESV_STRIDED_BATCHED solves a batch of general systems of n linear equations on n variables.

The linear systems are of the form

\[ A_l X_l = B_l \]where \(A_l\) is a general n-by-n matrix. Matrix \(A_l\) is first factorized in triangular factors \(L_l\) and \(U_l\) using

[GETRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1ae0feab0135a20479c7bb954b3348261d); then, the solutions are computed with[GETRS_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a35eafb6744f0a74539d4b8e30bf652ae).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The order of the system, i.e. the number of columns and rows of all A_l matrices.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of right hand sides, i.e., the number of columns of all the matrices B_l.**A**–**[in]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the matrices A_l. On exit, if info[l] = 0, the factors L_l and U_l of the LU decomposition of A_l returned by[GETRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1ae0feab0135a20479c7bb954b3348261d).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[inout]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**ipiv**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideP). The vectors ipiv_l of pivot indices returned by[GETRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1ae0feab0135a20479c7bb954b3348261d).**strideP**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one vector ipiv_l to the next one ipiv_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideP. Normal use case is strideP >= n.**B**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (size depends on the value of strideB). On entry, the right hand side matrices B_l. On exit, the solution matrix X_l of each system in the batch.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. The leading dimension of matrices B_l.**strideB**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix B_l to the next one B_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideB. Normal use case is strideB >= ldb*nrhs.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, U_l is singular, and the solution could not be computed. U_l[i,i] is the first zero element in the diagonal.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of instances (systems) in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zpotri([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zpotri14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cpotri([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_cpotri14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dpotri([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dpotri14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_spotri([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_spotri14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int) POTRI inverts a symmetric/hermitian positive definite matrix A.

The inverse of matrix \(A\) is computed as

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A^{-1} = U^{-1} {U^{-1}}' & \: \text{if uplo is upper, or}\\ A^{-1} = {L^{-1}}' L^{-1} & \: \text{if uplo is lower.} \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(U\) or \(L\) is the triangular factor of the Cholesky factorization of \(A\) returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of matrix A.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the factor L or U of the Cholesky factorization of A returned by[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f). On exit, the inverse of A if info = 0.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A.**info**–**[out]**pointer to a rocblas_int on the GPU. If info = 0, successful exit for inversion of A. If info = i > 0, A is singular. L[i,i] or U[i,i] is zero.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zpotri_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_zpotri_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cpotri_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_cpotri_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dpotri_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dpotri_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_spotri_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_spotri_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) POTRI_BATCHED inverts a batch of symmetric/hermitian positive definite matrices \(A_l\).

The inverse of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch is computed as

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l^{-1} = U_l^{-1} {U_l^{-1}}' & \: \text{if uplo is upper, or}\\ A_l^{-1} = {L_l^{-1}}' L_l^{-1} & \: \text{if uplo is lower.} \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(U_l\) or \(L_l\) is the triangular factor of the Cholesky factorization of \(A_l\) returned by

[POTRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a64637bff034365c2667eca3721eff4a9).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of matrix A_l.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the factor L_l or U_l of the Cholesky factorization of A_l returned by[POTRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a64637bff034365c2667eca3721eff4a9). On exit, the inverses of A_l if info[l] = 0.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for inversion of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, A_l is singular. L_l[i,i] or U_l[i,i] is zero.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zpotri_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_zpotri_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cpotri_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_cpotri_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dpotri_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_dpotri_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)
