[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_spotri_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_spotri_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) POTRI_STRIDED_BATCHED inverts a batch of symmetric/hermitian positive definite matrices \(A_l\).

The inverse of matrix \(A_l\) in the batch is computed as

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l^{-1} = U_l^{-1} {U_l^{-1}}' & \: \text{if uplo is upper, or}\\ A_l^{-1} = {L_l^{-1}}' L_l^{-1} & \: \text{if uplo is lower.} \end{array} \end{split}\]where \(U_l\) or \(L_l\) is the triangular factor of the Cholesky factorization of \(A_l\) returned by

[POTRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a62177c8dae1549385502c300b7a4724a).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of rows and columns of matrix A_l.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the factor L_l or U_l of the Cholesky factorization of A_l returned by[POTRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a62177c8dae1549385502c300b7a4724a). On exit, the inverses of A_l if info[l] = 0.**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. Specifies the leading dimension of A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for inversion of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, A_l is singular. L_l[i,i] or U_l[i,i] is zero.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zpotrs([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_zpotrs14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cpotrs([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_cpotrs14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dpotrs([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_dpotrs14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_spotrs([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb)[#](#_CPPv416rocsolver_spotrs14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_int) POTRS solves a symmetric/hermitian system of n linear equations on n variables in its factorized form.

It solves the system

\[ A X = B \]where A is a real symmetric (complex hermitian) positive definite matrix defined by its triangular factor

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A = U'U & \: \text{if uplo is upper, or}\\ A = LL' & \: \text{if uplo is lower.} \end{array} \end{split}\]as returned by

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The order of the system, i.e. the number of columns and rows of A.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of right hand sides, i.e., the number of columns of the matrix B.**A**–**[in]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. The factor L or U of the Cholesky factorization of A returned by[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A.**B**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension ldb*nrhs. On entry, the right hand side matrix B. On exit, the solution matrix X.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. The leading dimension of B.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zpotrs_batched_64([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const int64_t n, const int64_t nrhs,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const int64_t lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const B[], const int64_t ldb, const int64_t batch_count)[#](#_CPPv427rocsolver_zpotrs_batched_6414rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK7int64_tK7int64_tA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK7int64_tA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK7int64_tK7int64_t)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dpotrs_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_dpotrs_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_spotrs_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv424rocsolver_spotrs_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) POTRS_BATCHED solves a batch of symmetric/hermitian systems of n linear equations on n variables in its factorized forms.

For each instance l in the batch, it solves the system

\[ A_l X_l = B_l \]where \(A_l\) is a real symmetric (complex hermitian) positive definite matrix defined by its triangular factor

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l^{} = U_l'U_l^{} & \: \text{if uplo is upper, or}\\ A_l^{} = L_l^{}L_l' & \: \text{if uplo is lower.} \end{array} \end{split}\]as returned by

[POTRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The order of the system, i.e. the number of columns and rows of all A_l matrices.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of right hand sides, i.e., the number of columns of all the matrices B_l.**A**–**[in]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. The factor L_l or U_l of the Cholesky factorization of A_l returned by[POTRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a64637bff034365c2667eca3721eff4a9).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of matrices A_l.**B**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension ldb*nrhs. On entry, the right hand side matrices B_l. On exit, the solution matrix X_l of each system in the batch.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. The leading dimension of matrices B_l.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of instances (systems) in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zpotrs_strided_batched_64([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const int64_t n, const int64_t nrhs,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const int64_t lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*B, const int64_t ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB, const int64_t batch_count)[#](#_CPPv435rocsolver_zpotrs_strided_batched_6414rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK7int64_tK7int64_tP22rocblas_double_complexK7int64_tK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK7int64_tK14rocblas_strideK7int64_t)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cpotrs_strided_batched_64([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const int64_t n, const int64_t nrhs,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const int64_t lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*B, const int64_t ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB, const int64_t batch_count)[#](#_CPPv435rocsolver_cpotrs_strided_batched_6414rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK7int64_tK7int64_tP21rocblas_float_complexK7int64_tK14rocblas_strideP21rocblas_float_complexK7int64_tK14rocblas_strideK7int64_t)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dpotrs_strided_batched_64([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const int64_t n, const int64_t nrhs, double *A, const int64_t lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, double *B, const int64_t ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB, const int64_t batch_count)[#](#_CPPv435rocsolver_dpotrs_strided_batched_6414rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK7int64_tK7int64_tPdK7int64_tK14rocblas_stridePdK7int64_tK14rocblas_strideK7int64_t)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dpotrs_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, double *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_dpotrs_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePdK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_spotrs_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv432rocsolver_spotrs_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideK11rocblas_int) POTRS_STRIDED_BATCHED solves a batch of symmetric/hermitian systems of n linear equations on n variables in its factorized forms.

For each instance l in the batch, it solves the system

\[ A_l X_l = B_l \]where \(A_l\) is a real symmetric (complex hermitian) positive definite matrix defined by its triangular factor

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l^{} = U_l'U_l^{} & \: \text{if uplo is upper, or}\\ A_l^{} = L_l^{}L_l' & \: \text{if uplo is lower.} \end{array} \end{split}\]as returned by

[POTRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The order of the system, i.e. the number of columns and rows of all A_l matrices.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of right hand sides, i.e., the number of columns of all the matrices B_l.**A**–**[in]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). The factor L_l or U_l of the Cholesky factorization of A_l returned by[POTRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a62177c8dae1549385502c300b7a4724a).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**B**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (size depends on the value of strideB). On entry, the right hand side matrices B_l. On exit, the solution matrix X_l of each system in the batch.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. The leading dimension of matrices B_l.**strideB**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix B_l to the next one B_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideB. Normal use case is strideB >= ldb*nrhs.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of instances (systems) in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zposv([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv415rocsolver_zposv14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cposv([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv415rocsolver_cposv14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dposv([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv415rocsolver_dposv14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sposv([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv415rocsolver_sposv14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int) POSV solves a symmetric/hermitian system of n linear equations on n variables.

It solves the system

\[ A X = B \]where A is a real symmetric (complex hermitian) positive definite matrix. Matrix A is first factorized as \(A=LL'\) or \(A=U'U\), depending on the value of uplo, using

[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f); then, the solution is computed with[POTRS](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a04b818b7b9a32d25b10d9d71b0b6b64b).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The order of the system, i.e. the number of columns and rows of A.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of right hand sides, i.e., the number of columns of the matrix B.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the symmetric/hermitian matrix A. On exit, if info = 0, the factor L or U of the Cholesky factorization of A returned by[POTRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a33f3fbe51b637b25d59a4507ae43221f).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of A.**B**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension ldb*nrhs. On entry, the right hand side matrix B. On exit, the solution matrix X.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. The leading dimension of B.**info**–**[out]**pointer to a rocblas_int on the GPU. If info = 0, successful exit. If info = i > 0, the leading minor of order i of A is not positive definite. The solution could not be computed.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zposv_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv423rocsolver_zposv_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cposv_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv423rocsolver_cposv_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dposv_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv423rocsolver_dposv_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sposv_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv423rocsolver_sposv_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) POSV_BATCHED solves a batch of symmetric/hermitian systems of n linear equations on n variables.

For each instance l in the batch, it solves the system

\[ A_l X_l = B_l \]where \(A_l\) is a real symmetric (complex hermitian) positive definite matrix. Matrix \(A_l\) is first factorized as \(A_l^{}=L_l^{}L_l'\) or \(A_l^{}=U_l'U_l^{}\), depending on the value of uplo, using

[POTRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a64637bff034365c2667eca3721eff4a9); then, the solution is computed with[POTRS_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a788d1fdc225731e4e9cb2a90bed16f71).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The order of the system, i.e. the number of columns and rows of all A_l matrices.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of right hand sides, i.e., the number of columns of all the matrices B_l.**A**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the symmetric/hermitian matrices A_l. On exit, if info[l] = 0, the factor L_l or U_l of the Cholesky factorization of A_l returned by[POTRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a64637bff034365c2667eca3721eff4a9).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of matrices A_l.**B**–**[inout]**Array of pointers to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension ldb*nrhs. On entry, the right hand side matrices B_l. On exit, the solution matrix X_l of each system in the batch.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. The leading dimension of matrices B_l.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit. If info[l] = i > 0, the leading minor of order i of A_l is not positive definite. The l-th solution could not be computed.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of instances (systems) in the batch.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zposv_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv431rocsolver_zposv_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cposv_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv431rocsolver_cposv_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sposv_strided_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle, const[rocblas_fill](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv412rocblas_fill)uplo, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA, float *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv431rocsolver_sposv_strided_batched14rocblas_handleK12rocblas_fillK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_stridePfK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) POSV_STRIDED_BATCHED solves a batch of symmetric/hermitian systems of n linear equations on n variables.

For each instance l in the batch, it solves the system

\[ A_l X_l = B_l \]where \(A_l\) is a real symmetric (complex hermitian) positive definite matrix. Matrix \(A_l\) is first factorized as \(A_l^{}=L_l^{}L_l'\) or \(A_l^{}=U_l'U_l^{}\), depending on the value of uplo, using

[POTRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a62177c8dae1549385502c300b7a4724a); then, the solution is computed with[POTRS_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a5e73c11d69b43d656b9586ebb439208d).- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**uplo**–**[in]**rocblas_fill. Specifies whether the factorization is upper or lower triangular. If uplo indicates lower (or upper), then the upper (or lower) part of A_l is not used.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The order of the system, i.e. the number of columns and rows of all A_l matrices.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of right hand sides, i.e., the number of columns of all the matrices B_l.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (the size depends on the value of strideA). On entry, the symmetric/hermitian matrices A_l. On exit, if info[l] = 0, the factor L_l or U_l of the Cholesky factorization of A_l returned by[POTRF_STRIDED_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a62177c8dae1549385502c300b7a4724a).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= n. The leading dimension of matrices A_l.**strideA**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix A_l to the next one A_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideA. Normal use case is strideA >= lda*n.**B**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU (size depends on the value of strideB). On entry, the right hand side matrices B_l. On exit, the solution matrix X_l of each system in the batch.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= n. The leading dimension of matrices B_l.**strideB**–**[in]**rocblas_stride. Stride from the start of one matrix B_l to the next one B_(l+1). There is no restriction for the value of strideB. Normal use case is strideB >= ldb*nrhs.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit. If info[l] = i > 0, the leading minor of order i of A_l is not positive definite. The l-th solution could not be computed.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of instances (systems) in the batch.

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgels([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle,[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv415rocsolver_zgels14rocblas_handle17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgels([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle,[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv415rocsolver_cgels14rocblas_handle17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgels([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle,[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, double *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv415rocsolver_dgels14rocblas_handle17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intPdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgels([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle,[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *A, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info)[#](#_CPPv415rocsolver_sgels14rocblas_handle17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intPfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_int) GELS solves an overdetermined (or underdetermined) linear system defined by an m-by-n matrix A, and a corresponding matrix B, using the QR factorization computed by

[GEQRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a37b336b66ef8dd4d70e2ccff92f038d8)(or the LQ factorization computed by[GELQF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a99502a6fa094a310499dd853bc0db0d6)).Depending on the value of trans, the problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A X = B & \: \text{not transposed, or}\\ A' X = B & \: \text{transposed if real, or conjugate transposed if complex} \end{array} \end{split}\]If m >= n (or m < n in the case of transpose/conjugate transpose), the system is overdetermined and a least-squares solution approximating X is found by minimizing

\[ || B - A X || \quad \text{(or} \: || B - A' X ||\text{)} \]If m < n (or m >= n in the case of transpose/conjugate transpose), the system is underdetermined and a unique solution for X is chosen such that \(|| X ||\) is minimal.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**trans**–**[in]**rocblas_operation. Specifies the form of the system of equations.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of matrix A.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of matrix A.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of columns of matrices B and X; i.e., the columns on the right hand side.**A**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrix A. On exit, the QR (or LQ) factorization of A as returned by[GEQRF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a37b336b66ef8dd4d70e2ccff92f038d8)(or[GELQF](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a99502a6fa094a310499dd853bc0db0d6)).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrix A.**B**–**[inout]**pointer to type. Array on the GPU of dimension ldb*nrhs. On entry, the matrix B. On exit, when info = 0, B is overwritten by the solution vectors (and the residuals in the overdetermined cases) stored as columns.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= max(m,n). Specifies the leading dimension of matrix B.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int on the GPU. If info = 0, successful exit. If info = i > 0, the solution could not be computed because input matrix A is rank deficient; the i-th diagonal element of its triangular factor is zero.



-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_zgels_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle,[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_double_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv422rocblas_double_complex)*const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv423rocsolver_zgels_batched14rocblas_handle17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intA_PC22rocblas_double_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_cgels_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle,[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv423rocsolver_cgels_batched14rocblas_handle17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intA_PC21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_dgels_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle,[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, double *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, double *const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv423rocsolver_dgels_batched14rocblas_handle17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intA_PCdK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)

-
[rocblas_status](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv414rocblas_status)rocsolver_sgels_batched([rocblas_handle](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_handle)handle,[rocblas_operation](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/enumerations.html#_CPPv417rocblas_operation)trans, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)m, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)n, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)nrhs, float *const A[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)lda, float *const B[], const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv423rocsolver_sgels_batched14rocblas_handle17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intA_PCfK11rocblas_intP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int) GELS_BATCHED solves a batch of overdetermined (or underdetermined) linear systems defined by a set of m-by-n matrices \(A_l\), and corresponding matrices \(B_l\), using the QR factorizations computed by

[GEQRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a311b5e6e07b09d5423d1b47a5c4e8709)(or the LQ factorizations computed by[GELQF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a82cc07dd4bb7714506e88245a8a2fedb)).For each instance in the batch, depending on the value of trans, the problem solved by this function is either of the form

\[\begin{split} \begin{array}{cl} A_l X_l = B_l & \: \text{not transposed, or}\\ A_l' X_l^{} = B_l^{} & \: \text{transposed if real, or conjugate transposed if complex} \end{array} \end{split}\]If m >= n (or m < n in the case of transpose/conjugate transpose), the system is overdetermined and a least-squares solution approximating X_l is found by minimizing

\[ || B_l - A_l X_l || \quad \text{(or} \: || B_l^{} - A_l' X_l^{} ||\text{)} \]If m < n (or m >= n in the case of transpose/conjugate transpose), the system is underdetermined and a unique solution for X_l is chosen such that \(|| X_l ||\) is minimal.

- Parameters:
**handle**–**[in]**rocblas_handle.**trans**–**[in]**rocblas_operation. Specifies the form of the system of equations.**m**–**[in]**rocblas_int. m >= 0. The number of rows of all matrices A_l in the batch.**n**–**[in]**rocblas_int. n >= 0. The number of columns of all matrices A_l in the batch.**nrhs**–**[in]**rocblas_int. nrhs >= 0. The number of columns of all matrices B_l and X_l in the batch; i.e., the columns on the right hand side.**A**–**[inout]**array of pointer to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension lda*n. On entry, the matrices A_l. On exit, the QR (or LQ) factorizations of A_l as returned by[GEQRF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a311b5e6e07b09d5423d1b47a5c4e8709)(or[GELQF_BATCHED](#rocsolver-functions_8h_1a82cc07dd4bb7714506e88245a8a2fedb)).**lda**–**[in]**rocblas_int. lda >= m. Specifies the leading dimension of matrices A_l.**B**–**[inout]**array of pointer to type. Each pointer points to an array on the GPU of dimension ldb*nrhs. On entry, the matrices B_l. On exit, when info[l] = 0, B_l is overwritten by the solution vectors (and the residuals in the overdetermined cases) stored as columns.**ldb**–**[in]**rocblas_int. ldb >= max(m,n). Specifies the leading dimension of matrices B_l.**info**–**[out]**pointer to rocblas_int. Array of batch_count integers on the GPU. If info[l] = 0, successful exit for solution of A_l. If info[l] = i > 0, the solution of A_l could not be computed because input matrix A_l is rank deficient; the i-th diagonal element of its triangular factor is zero.**batch_count**–**[in]**rocblas_int. batch_count >= 0. Number of matrices in the batch.



-

const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideA,[rocblas_float_complex](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv421rocblas_float_complex)*B, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)ldb, const[rocblas_stride](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv414rocblas_stride)strideB,[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)*info, const[rocblas_int](https://rocm.docs.amd.com/projects/rocBLAS/en/latest/reference/datatypes.html#_CPPv411rocblas_int)batch_count)[#](#_CPPv431rocsolver_cgels_strided_batched14rocblas_handle17rocblas_operationK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intK11rocblas_intP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP21rocblas_float_complexK11rocblas_intK14rocblas_strideP11rocblas_intK11rocblas_int)
